final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "S3 bucket with organization/OU-based access control, HTTPS enforcement, and SSE-KMS encryption"

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    AllowedPattern: "^$|o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$"
    Description: "Optional AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-abc123defg). Leave empty for single-account use."
  OrganizationalUnitId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    AllowedPattern: "^$|ou-[a-z0-9]{4,32}-[a-z0-9]{8,32}$"
    Description: "Optional AWS Organizational Unit ID (e.g., ou-abc1-2defghij). Leave empty for single-account use."

Conditions:
  IsSingleAccount: !And [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, ""], !Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitId, ""]]
  HasOrgId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, ""]]
  HasOUId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationalUnitId, ""]]

Resources:
  S3BucketKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for S3 bucket SSE-KMS encryption"
      Enabled: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM policies
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow S3 service to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"

  S3BucketKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/s3-${S3Bucket}-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3BucketKMSKey

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3BucketKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - !If
            - IsSingleAccount
            - Sid: AllowSingleAccount
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:ListBucket
              Resource:
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  aws:SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
            - !Ref AWS::NoValue
          - !If
            - HasOrgId
            - Sid: AllowOrganization
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:ListBucket
              Resource:
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
            - !Ref AWS::NoValue
          - !If
            - HasOUId
            - Sid: AllowOrganizationalUnit
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:ListBucket
              Resource:
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
                - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
              Condition:
                ForAnyValue:StringLike:
                  aws:PrincipalOrgPaths: !Sub "*/${OrganizationalUnitId}/*"
            - !Ref AWS::NoValue
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String

    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  SubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/24'
    Description: CIDR block for the subnet within the VPC.
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dev'
    Description: Environment name for tagging resources.

Resources:
  # VPC
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Single subnet (private – no public IP)
  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-subnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Security Group
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for the VPC
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Customer Managed KMS Key for S3 encryption
  S3KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # S3 Bucket
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3KMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # DynamoDB Table
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-table'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-table'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

Outputs:

    Description: Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref Subnet

    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Table Name
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with public and private subnets, route tables, and internet access for public subnets'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    AllowedPattern: '(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}'
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-Subnet-1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-Subnet-2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.11.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-Subnet-1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Private

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.12.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-Subnet-2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Private

  # Public Route Table and Routes
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-RT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Tables (one per AZ)
  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-RT-1'

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-RT-2'

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: 'ID of the Application VPC'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: 'List of public subnet IDs'
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: 'List of private subnet IDs'
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetIds'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: 'ID of the Internet Gateway'
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IgatewayId'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: 'ID of the public route table'
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableIds:
    Description: 'List of private route table IDs'
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateRouteTable1, !Ref PrivateRouteTable2]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableIds'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 instance with HTTP access and S3 bucket'
Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: 'SSM parameter for latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTable'
  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instance allowing HTTP'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LaunchTemplate'
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'
  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP'
  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root account full access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service to use the key for the bucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-s3bucket'
      Description: 'KMS Customer Managed Key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKey'
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3Bucket'
  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

      - t3.medium

    Type: String
    Default: 4.91.1

Resources:
  VPC:

    Properties:

    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route

    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

    Properties:

          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/canonical/ubuntu/server/22.04/stable/current/amd64/hvm/ebs-gp2/ami-id}}'
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EC2LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EC2LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeleteOnTermination: true
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get install -y curl
          # Install code-server with specified version
          curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh -s -- --version "${CodeServerVersion}"
          # Create configuration
          mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/.config/code-server
          cat > /home/ubuntu/.config/code-server/config.yaml << 'EOF'
          bind-addr: 0.0.0.0:8080
          auth: none
          cert: false
          EOF
          chown -R ubuntu:ubuntu /home/ubuntu/.config
          # Enable and start code-server as the ubuntu user
          loginctl enable-linger ubuntu
          sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'systemctl --user enable code-server'
          sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'systemctl --user start code-server'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: code-server-instance

  CachePolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CachePolicy
    Properties:
      CachePolicyConfig:
        Name: code-server-cache-policy
        DefaultTTL: 31536000
        MaxTTL: 31536000
        MinTTL: 31536000
        ParametersInCacheKeyAndForwardedToOrigin:
          EnableAcceptEncodingGzip: true
          EnableAcceptEncodingBrotli: true
          CookiesConfig:
            CookieBehavior: none
          HeadersConfig:
            HeaderBehavior: none
          QueryStringsConfig:
            QueryStringBehavior: none

  OriginRequestPolicy:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::OriginRequestPolicy
    Properties:
      OriginRequestPolicyConfig:
        Name: code-server-origin-request-policy
        Comment: Forwards all viewer headers, cookies, and query strings
        CookiesConfig:
          CookieBehavior: all
        HeadersConfig:
          HeaderBehavior: allViewer
        QueryStringsConfig:
          QueryStringBehavior: all

  WebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: code-server-web-acl
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      Rules:
        - Name: AWS-AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
          Priority: 0
          Statement:
            ManagedRuleGroupStatement:
              VendorName: AWS
              Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
          OverrideAction:
            None: {}
          VisibilityConfig:
            SampledRequestsEnabled: true
            CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
            MetricName: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: code-server-web-acl

  ViewerCert:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DomainName: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
      ValidationMethod: DNS

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        Origins:
          - Id: CodeServerOrigin
            DomainName: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: CodeServerOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          CachePolicyId: !Ref CachePolicy
          OriginRequestPolicyId: !Ref OriginRequestPolicy
        DefaultRootObject: ''
        PriceClass: PriceClass_All
        ViewerCertificate:
          AcmCertificateArn: !Ref ViewerCert
          SslSupportMethod: sni-only
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2025
        WebACLId: !Ref WebACL

Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: CloudFront distribution domain name
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: EC2 instance public IP address
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS cluster with Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers'

Parameters:
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: my-ecs-cluster
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][-a-zA-Z0-9]{0,255}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Cluster name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens (max 256 characters)'
    Description: 'Name for the ECS cluster'

  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development
    Description: 'Environment tag for the cluster'

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ClusterName
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE
        - FARGATE_SPOT
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Base: 1
          Weight: 1
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE_SPOT
          Base: 0
          Weight: 2
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: 'Name of the ECS cluster'
    Value: !Ref ClusterName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ClusterName'

  ClusterArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ECS cluster'
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ClusterArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "ECS Fargate task definition with IAM roles and CloudWatch logging for NGINX demo."

Resources:
  # Task Execution Role - allows ECS to pull images and push logs
  TaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy

  # Task Role - grants SSM permissions for ECS Exec
  TaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMExecPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: "*"

  # CloudWatch Log Group for container logs, 7-day retention
  NginxLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /ecs/nginx-demo
      RetentionInDays: 7

  # ECS Task Definition
  NginxTaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: nginx-demo-task
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: "256"
      Memory: "512"
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskExecutionRole.Arn
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskRole.Arn
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx
          Image: nginx:latest
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              HostPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref NginxLogGroup
              awslogs-region: us-east-1
              awslogs-stream-prefix: ecs-nginx

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for Windows EC2 CPU stress testing with SSM and FIS integration'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Description: EC2 instance type (t3.nano to t3.large)
    Default: t3.nano
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid t3 instance type

  AmiParameter:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Default: 'ami-024f768332a6b2c91'
    Description: AMI ID for the Windows Server 2019 EC2 instance. For AWS deployments, override with a valid Windows AMI for your region.

  CpuStressDuration:
    Type: Number
    Default: 120
    Description: Duration in seconds for the CPU stress test

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnet (no public IP on launch)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  # Public Route Table and Default Route
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group for EC2 instance
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Windows EC2 instance enabling SSM and RDP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3389
          ToPort: 3389
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-sg'

  # Security Group for VPC Endpoints
  EndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for VPC endpoints allowing HTTPS from instance SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-endpoint-sg'

  # VPC Endpoints for SSM
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt EndpointSecurityGroup.GroupId
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt EndpointSecurityGroup.GroupId
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt EndpointSecurityGroup.GroupId
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # IAM Role for EC2 instance with SSM managed policy
  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-role'

  # Instance Profile for EC2
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance-profile'

  # Launch Template for EC2 instance (IMDSv2 enforcement)
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  # EC2 Instance with encrypted root volume and LaunchTemplate for IMDS
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref AmiParameter
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-windows-instance'

  # Custom SSM Document for CPU Stress Testing
  CpuStressDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cpu-stress'
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'Run CPU stress test by spawning threads equal to logical processors for a configurable duration'
        parameters:
          DurationSeconds:
            type: String
            description: Duration in seconds for CPU stress
            default: !Ref CpuStressDuration
        mainSteps:
          - action: 'aws:runPowerShellScript'
            name: CpuStress
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - $duration = {{ DurationSeconds }}
                - $logicalProcessors = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).NumberOfLogicalProcessors
                - Write-Host "Starting CPU stress test with $logicalProcessors threads for $duration seconds"
                - $jobs = @()
                - for ($i = 0; $i -lt $logicalProcessors; $i++) {
                    $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock {
                        param($sec)
                        $endTime = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($sec)
                        while ((Get-Date) -lt $endTime) {
                            [math]::Sqrt([math]::Pow(12345, 2))
                        }
                    } -ArgumentList $duration
                  }
                - $jobs | Wait-Job
                - $jobs | Receive-Job
                - Write-Host "CPU stress test completed"

  # IAM Role for FIS (Fault Injection Service)
  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISExperimentPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                  - ec2:DescribeTags
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:PassRole
                Resource: !GetAtt EC2InstanceRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fis-role'

  # CloudWatch Log Group for FIS experiments
  FISLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/fis/${AWS::StackName}'
      RetentionInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fis-log-group'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: SSM Document name for CPU stress testing
    Value: !Ref CpuStressDocument

  FISRoleArn:
    Description: IAM Role ARN for AWS FIS
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'DynamoDB tables for supporter product data, environment-specific (PROD/CODE)'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    AllowedPattern: '(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}'
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC (greenfield demo resource)

  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE
    Default: CODE
    Description: Environment to create resources for (PROD or CODE)

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
  IsCode: !Not [!Condition IsProd]

Resources:
  # Greenfield VPC – required for networking but not directly used by DynamoDB
  Vpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'SupporterData-${Stage}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage

  # DynamoDB table for PROD environment (provisioned throughput + auto-scaling)
  SupporterProductDataTableProd:
    Condition: IsProd
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: SupporterProductData-PROD
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PROVISIONED
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        ReadCapacityUnits: 20
        WriteCapacityUnits: 5
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: expiryDate
        Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: PROD
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SupporterProductData

  # DynamoDB table for CODE environment (on‑demand)
  SupporterProductDataTableCode:
    Condition: IsCode
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: SupporterProductData-CODE
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: SupporterId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: expiryDate
        Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: CODE
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SupporterProductData

  # IAM role for Application Auto Scaling (used only by PROD scaling)
  AutoScalingRole:
    Condition: IsProd
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: dynamodb.application-autoscaling.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBTableScaling
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                  - dynamodb:UpdateTable
                  - application-autoscaling:RegisterScalableTarget
                  - application-autoscaling:DeregisterScalableTarget
                  - application-autoscaling:PutScalingPolicy
                  - application-autoscaling:DeleteScalingPolicy
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricAlarm
                  - cloudwatch:DeleteAlarms
                  - cloudwatch:DescribeAlarms
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: PROD

  # Scalable target for PROD table write capacity
  WriteCapacityScalableTarget:
    Condition: IsProd
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Properties:
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductDataTableProd}'
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      MinCapacity: 5
      MaxCapacity: 500
      RoleARN: !GetAtt AutoScalingRole.Arn

  # Scaling policy – target tracking at 70% write capacity utilization
  WriteCapacityScalingPolicy:
    Condition: IsProd
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: WriteCapacityTargetTracking
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteCapacityScalableTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        TargetValue: 70
        ScaleInCooldown: 300
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization

Outputs:
  ProdTableName:
    Condition: IsProd
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTableProd
    Description: PROD DynamoDB table name

  ProdTableArn:
    Condition: IsProd
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTableProd.Arn
    Description: PROD DynamoDB table ARN

  CodeTableName:
    Condition: IsCode
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTableCode
    Description: CODE DynamoDB table name

  CodeTableArn:
    Condition: IsCode
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTableCode.Arn
    Description: CODE DynamoDB table ARN

  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref Vpc
    Description: VPC ID created for greenfield environment

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Creates an S3 bucket for CloudWatch log exports with mandatory SSE-KMS encryption,
  configurable versioning, and lifecycle management. All public access is blocked.
  Deletion and update replace policies are set to Retain to protect data.

Parameters:
  VersioningStatus:
    Description: >
      Enable or suspend versioning on the bucket. Once enabled, versioning
      cannot be disabled – only suspended.
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled

  TransitionToStandardIADays:
    Description: >
      Number of days after object creation when objects are transitioned to
      STANDARD_IA storage class.
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    Default: 30

  TransitionToGlacierDeepArchiveDays:
    Description: >
      Number of days after object creation when objects are transitioned to
      DEEP_ARCHIVE storage class.
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    Default: 180

  ExpirationDays:
    Description: >
      Number of days after object creation when objects expire and are
      permanently deleted.
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    Default: 365

Resources:
  # Customer managed KMS key for S3 server-side encryption
  CloudWatchExportKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for S3 bucket server-side encryption"
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root user full access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow CloudWatch Logs to use the key for SSE-KMS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      MultiRegion: false

  CloudWatchExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub cloudwatch-exports-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExportLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
                TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToStandardIADays
              - StorageClass: DEEP_ARCHIVE
                TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDeepArchiveDays
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref CloudWatchExportKMSKey

  CloudWatchExportBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsExport
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::cloudwatch-exports-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::cloudwatch-exports-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}/*
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch export S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: KMS key ID for S3 bucket server-side encryption
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportKMSKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and KMS key for encryption with associated IAM role.'

Resources:
  # IAM role for Lambda service, referenced in KMS key policy
  LambdaServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Description: 'IAM role for Lambda service to access KMS key and S3 bucket'

  # S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts - hardened with public access block and KMS encryption
  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey

  # Customer-managed KMS key with automatic rotation
  LambdaArtifactsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'EnableRootAdminPermissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'AllowServiceRoleUsage'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaServiceRole.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'AllowS3ServiceUsage'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  # KMS key alias for simplified referencing
  LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts'
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: 'ID of the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKMSKey
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsKMSKey.Arn
  KeyAlias:
    Description: 'Alias for the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role for Lambda service'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaServiceRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs with encryption, lifecycle, and restrictive access policy

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Optional custom name for the S3 bucket. Leave empty to let CloudFormation generate a unique name.
    Default: ""

  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    Description: Enable or suspend versioning on the bucket
    Default: Enabled
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended

  LifecycleTransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after object creation to transition logs to GLACIER storage class
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 3650

  LifecycleExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after object creation to permanently delete logs
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 365000

Conditions:
  UseCustomBucketName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref BucketName, ""]]

Resources:
  FlowLogsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow VPC Flow Logs Service to Use Key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Description: KMS key for encrypting VPC Flow Logs S3 objects
      Enabled: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If [UseCustomBucketName, !Ref BucketName, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKmsKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionToGlacierAndExpire
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: ""
            Transitions:
              - StorageClass: GLACIER
                TransitionInDays: !Ref LifecycleTransitionDays
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref LifecycleExpirationDays
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowVPCFlowLogsDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn

  KmsKeyId:
    Description: KMS Key ID used for S3 bucket encryption
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsKmsKey

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-configuring EC2 with Nginx and SSM logging'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs
          Ref: 'AWS::Region'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxPublicSubnet

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxRouteTable

  Route:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx web server
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxSecurityGroup

  IAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogsWrite
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/logs/*'
        - PolicyName: KMSLogsEncrypt
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt KMSKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxSSMRole

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref IAMRole

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxInstance
        - Key: SSM-Agent
          Value: enabled

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 log bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      PendingWindowInDays: 7

  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxLogBucket

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt IAMRole.Arn
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/logs/*'

  SSMAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    DependsOn:
      - EC2Instance
    Properties:
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:SSM-Agent
          Values:
            - enabled
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - sudo yum install -y nginx
          - sudo systemctl enable nginx
          - sudo systemctl start nginx
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref LogBucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Auto-configuring EC2 with Nginx, SSM, and centralized logging'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxPublicSubnet

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP and HTTPS inbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxSecurityGroup

  LogsBucketKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      Description: CMK for LogsBucket encryption

  LogsBucketKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/logs-bucket-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LogsBucketKMSKey

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogsBucketKMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  LogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonHttpsRequests
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt LogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${LogsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMInstanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt LogsBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub "${LogsBucket.Arn}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt LogsBucketKMSKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeTags
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchAgentPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: "{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}"
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      Monitoring: true
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxServer
        - Key: Nginx
          Value: 'true'
        - Key: LogBucketName
          Value: !Ref LogsBucket

  ServerEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxServerEIP

  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt ServerEIP.AllocationId

  SSMAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:Nginx
          Values:
            - 'true'
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            # Install Nginx
            amazon-linux-extras install nginx1 -y
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl start nginx
            # Install CloudWatch Agent
            yum install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent
            # Configure CloudWatch Agent to collect CPU, memory, disk
            mkdir -p /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc
            cat > /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc/config.json << 'EOF'
            {
              "metrics": {
                "namespace": "CWAgent",
                "metrics_collected": {
                  "cpu": {
                    "measurement": ["cpu_usage_idle", "cpu_usage_user", "cpu_usage_system"],
                    "metrics_collection_interval": 60
                  },
                  "mem": {
                    "measurement": ["mem_used_percent"],
                    "metrics_collection_interval": 60
                  },
                  "disk": {
                    "measurement": ["disk_used_percent"],
                    "metrics_collection_interval": 60,
                    "resources": ["/"]
                  }
                }
              }
            }
            EOF
            /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl -a fetch-config -m ec2 -c file:/opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc/config.json -s
            # Retrieve instance ID using IMDSv2
            TOKEN=$(curl -s -X PUT "http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token" -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds: 21600")
            INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $TOKEN" http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
            # Retrieve bucket name from instance tag
            BUCKET_NAME=$(aws ec2 describe-tags --filters "Name=resource-id,Values=$INSTANCE_ID" "Name=key,Values=LogBucketName" --query "Tags[0].Value" --output text)
            # Write bucket name to file for cron job
            echo "$BUCKET_NAME" > /etc/nginx-log-bucket-name
            # Create cron job to upload nginx logs to S3 every hour
            cat > /etc/cron.hourly/nginx-upload.sh << 'CRONEOF'
            #!/bin/bash
            BUCKET_NAME=$(cat /etc/nginx-log-bucket-name)
            /usr/bin/aws s3 sync /var/log/nginx/ "s3://$BUCKET_NAME/nginx-logs/" --exclude "*" --include "*.log"
            CRONEOF
            chmod +x /etc/cron.hourly/nginx-upload.sh
            # Write confirmation
            echo "Nginx installed and configured successfully at $(date)" > /tmp/nginx-installed.log
      AssociationName: NginxSetup

  CloudWatchDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: NginxInstanceDashboard
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "AWS/EC2", "CPUUtilization", "InstanceId", "${EC2Instance}" ]
                ],
                "period": 300,
                "stat": "Average",
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "CPU Utilization"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "x": 12,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "CWAgent", "mem_used_percent", "InstanceId", "${EC2Instance}", {"stat": "Average"} ]
                ],
                "period": 300,
                "stat": "Average",
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "Memory Used Percent"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 6,
              "width": 12,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "CWAgent", "disk_used_percent", "InstanceId", "${EC2Instance}", "device", "/dev/xvda1", "fstype", "xfs", {"stat": "Average"} ]
                ],
                "period": 300,
                "stat": "Average",
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "Disk Used Percent"
              }
            }
          ]
        }

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for logs
    Value: !Ref LogsBucket
  DashboardURL:
    Description: CloudWatch Dashboard URL
    Value: !Sub "https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=${AWS::Region}#dashboards:name=NginxInstanceDashboard"
  ElasticIP:
    Description: Elastic IP address assigned to the instance
    Value: !Ref ServerEIP
