final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 instance with SSM automation, Nginx, and centralized logging'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebServerVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebServerIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  WebServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP and required outbound traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 128.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 128.0.0.0/1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebServerSecurityGroup

  EC2InstanceProfileRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AndKMSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt KmsKey.Arn

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceProfileRole

  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable administration by root account
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:Create*
              - kms:Describe*
              - kms:Enable*
              - kms:List*
              - kms:Put*
              - kms:Update*
              - kms:Revoke*
              - kms:Disable*
              - kms:Get*
              - kms:Delete*
              - kms:TagResource
              - kms:UntagResource
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
            Resource: '*'

  KmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/ssm-log-bucket-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KmsKey

  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'ssm-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt KmsKey.Arn

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !GetAtt EC2InstanceProfileRole.Arn
                - !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Monitoring: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebServerInstance

  SSMAutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: Automate OS updates, Nginx installation, and web server validation
        assumeRole: !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn
        mainSteps:
          - name: UpdateOS
            action: aws:runShellScript
            description: Apply all yum updates and check if reboot is required
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - yum update -y
                - |
                  if needs-restarting -r; then
                    echo "Reboot required";
                    exit 1;
                  else
                    echo "No reboot required";
                  fi
          - name: InstallNginx
            action: aws:runShellScript
            description: Install Nginx via amazon-linux-extras
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - amazon-linux-extras install nginx1.12 -y
          - name: ValidateWebServer
            action: aws:runShellScript
            description: Start Nginx and validate with curl
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - systemctl start nginx
                - systemctl enable nginx
                - |
                  STATUS=$(curl -o /dev/null -s -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost/)
                  if [ "$STATUS" -eq 200 ]; then
                    echo "Validation successful - HTTP 200"
                  else
                    echo "Validation failed - HTTP $STATUS"
                    exit 1
                  fi

  AutomationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AutomationExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/${EC2Instance}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt KmsKey.Arn

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the web server
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

  InstancePublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the web server
    Value: !Ref EIP

  LogBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for centralized logging
    Value: !Ref LogBucket

  AutomationDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document
    Value: !Ref SSMAutomationDocument

  AutomationRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Automation execution
    Value: !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "EC2 instance with tag-driven SSM automation for OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation"

Resources:
  # VPC with /24 CIDR
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/24"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AutomationVPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AutomationIGW"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public subnet with same /24 CIDR
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/24"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "PublicSubnet"

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "PublicRouteTable"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # Security Group for web validation
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Allow HTTP and HTTPS inbound, all outbound"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "WebValidationSG"

  # VPC Endpoint Security Group
  EndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Allow HTTPS from instance SG for VPC endpoints"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref SecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "VpcEndpointSG"

  # Interface VPC Endpoints for SSM
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      VpcEndpointType: Interface

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      VpcEndpointType: Interface

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      VpcEndpointType: Interface

  # Gateway VPC Endpoint for S3
  S3Endpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref RouteTable
      VpcEndpointType: Gateway

  # IAM role and instance profile for SSM
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "SSM-EC2-Role"

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  # Launch Template with IMDSv2 enforcement
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
      LaunchTemplateName: "IMDSv2-LaunchTemplate"

  # EC2 instance with latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI, tag nginx: Yes
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: nginx
          Value: "Yes"
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AutomationInstance"

  # Elastic IP for public access
  ElasticIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AutomationEIP"

  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt ElasticIP.AllocationId

  # Custom SSM Automation document
  NginxAutomationDoc:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content:
        schemaVersion: "0.3"
        description: "Automated OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation"
        mainSteps:
          - name: updateOS
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Targets:
                - Key: "InstanceIds"
                  Values:
                    - "{{InstanceId}}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - |
                    #!/bin/bash
                    set -e
                    sudo yum update -y
                    sudo yum install -y yum-utils
                    if needs-restarting -r; then
                      echo "Reboot required after OS updates."
                    else
                      echo "No reboot required."
                    fi
          - name: installNginx
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Targets:
                - Key: "InstanceIds"
                  Values:
                    - "{{InstanceId}}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - |
                    #!/bin/bash
                    sudo yum install -y nginx
                    sudo systemctl enable nginx
                    sudo systemctl start nginx
          - name: validateWebServer
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              Targets:
                - Key: "InstanceIds"
                  Values:
                    - "{{InstanceId}}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - |
                    #!/bin/bash
                    HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost/)
                    if [ "$HTTP_CODE" -eq 200 ]; then
                      echo "Nginx validation successful: HTTP $HTTP_CODE"
                      exit 0
                    else
                      echo "Nginx validation failed: HTTP $HTTP_CODE"
                      exit 1
                    fi

  # SSM State Manager association targeting instances with nginx: Yes
  NginxAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref NginxAutomationDoc
      AssociationName: "NginxAutomation"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 0 1 * ? *)"
      Targets:
        - Key: "tag:nginx"
          Values:
            - "Yes"
      AutomationTargetParameterName: "InstanceId"
      Parameters:
        AutomationAssumeRole:
          - ""

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Production-ready VPC with public/private subnets, internal ALB, ECR repo, and SSM parameters
Parameters: {}
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionVPC
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2
  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet3
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.11.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.12.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.13.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet3
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPCIGW
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPCNAT
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable
  DefaultPrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway
  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  PrivateSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Application security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AppSecurityGroup
  AlbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: ALB security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AlbSecurityGroup
  DatabaseSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Database security group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DatabaseSecurityGroup
  ApplicationLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InternalALB
  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      TargetType: ip
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBTargetGroup
  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: HTTPS
            Port: 443
            StatusCode: HTTP_301
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: application-repo
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: application-repo
  VpcIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/vpc/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/public1
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/public2
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PublicSubnet3Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/public3
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet3
  PrivateSubnet1Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/private1
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/private2
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet3Parameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/subnet/private3
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
  AppSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/securitygroup/app
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
  AlbSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/securitygroup/alb
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
  DatabaseSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/securitygroup/db
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DatabaseSecurityGroup
  AlbListenerArnParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /infra/alb/listener
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBListener

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket to store organizational data.
    Default: my-org-data-bucket
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS account ID of the management account.
    AllowedPattern: ^\d{12}$
    Default: '000000000000'
  CrossAccountRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the IAM role in the management account to assume.
    AllowedPattern: arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/[\w+=,.@-]+
    Default: 'arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/OrgDataCollectorRole'
  TagsToReport:
    Type: String
    Description: Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in the report (e.g., "Department,CostCenter").
    Default: ''
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the Glue database for querying organization data.
    Default: managementcur

Resources:
  # Customer managed KMS key for S3 encryption
  OrgDataKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAdminPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'

  # KMS alias (optional but recommended for easier key identification)
  OrgDataKmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/OrgData-${AWS::StackName}'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref OrgDataKmsKey

  # S3 bucket with encryption using the CMK, public access block, and strict policy
  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref OrgDataKmsKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  # Bucket policy denying non-HTTPS traffic and restricting write to Lambda and Glue roles
  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonHttps
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: RestrictWriteToLambdaAndGlue
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
                - !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
          - Sid: AllowGlueRead
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
          - Sid: AllowGlueList
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
            Action: s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn

  # IAM role for Lambda
  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: OrgDataCollection
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AssumeCrossAccountRole
                Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Ref CrossAccountRoleArn
              - Sid: S3Write
                Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
              - Sid: KMSEncrypt
                Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKmsKey.Arn

  # Lambda function (code provided as base64-encoded ZIP – replace with actual deployment package)
  OrgDataCollectorFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: OrgDataCollector
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3_BUCKET: !Ref BucketName
          CROSS_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ARN: !Ref CrossAccountRoleArn
          MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          TAGS_TO_REPORT: !Ref TagsToReport
      Code:
        ZipFile: >
          UEsDBBQAAAAIAAAAIQC5gxNfYQEAAJEDAAAJAAAAaW5kZXgucHl1lU9LwzAYh+9
          +ipfuG7ZRZ3cg24eBoOIFZDqQegtpmtqMpCmJKLv43U1rPdYdPT3vv+f3vklb
          IykKkGy6XNFH+otVBoNV5oWQHoLiJSraGgg12itSQsSzR10XdQKFpz0EO6O0p
          BqOq9k7Z6Cqo7ZpYHhuS1KaljswZ4/YJJJsJiRS9BzURFr7xje+8Y1v/KMb3/j
          GN77xd3zjG9/xG9/4xj/xjW984yd+4zt+4jv4xnf8oxt+8Y9u+MUPfsM3fvCDX/
          wH3/gNHzfC/A1QSwECLQIUAAQAAAAAIQC5gxNfYQEAAJEDAAAJAAAAAAAAAAAA
          AAAAAAC2gQAAAABpbmRleC5weVBLBQYAAAAAAQABAEAAAAB7AQAAAAA=
      # Replace the above ZipFile base64 string with the actual ZIP of a Python script
      # that assumes cross-account role, lists Organizations data, and writes to S3.

  # Permission for CloudWatch Events to invoke Lambda
  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrgDataCollectorFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyScheduleRule.Arn

  # CloudWatch Events rule to trigger Lambda weekly
  WeeklyScheduleRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: OrgDataWeeklyCollection
      ScheduleExpression: rate(7 days)
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectorFunction.Arn
          Id: OrgDataCollectorTarget

  # Glue database
  GlueDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: Database for AWS Organization data collected from management account.

  # IAM role for Glue crawler
  GlueRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessForGlueCrawler
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: S3Read
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
              - Sid: S3List
                Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - Sid: KMSDecrypt
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt OrgDataKmsKey.Arn

  # Glue crawler to catalog S3 data
  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: org-data-crawler
      Role: !GetAtt GlueRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref GlueDatabase
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${BucketName}/org-data/'
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: cron(0 6 ? * SUN *)   # Weekly Sunday 6 AM UTC
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: DEPRECATE_IN_DATABASE
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"}}}'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for organizational data.
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function that collects organization data.
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataCollectorFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'
  GlueDatabaseArn:
    Description: ARN of the Glue database for querying organization data.
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:database/${GlueDatabase}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueDatabaseArn'
  GlueCrawlerArn:
    Description: ARN of the Glue crawler.
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:crawler/${OrgDataCrawler}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerArn'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-0c366632' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-0c366632: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueDatabase: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueDatabase: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataKmsKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataKmsKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'GlueRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataCollectorFunction: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataCollectorFunction: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'WeeklyScheduleRule: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'WeeklyScheduleRule: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataCrawler: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataCrawler: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataKmsAlias: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataKmsAlias: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-0c366632: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Secure multi-AZ VPC with public/private subnets and NAT Gateway, following Well-Architected best practices."

Mappings:
  TagMap:
    Tags:
      Environment: "Production"
      CostCenter: "Shared"
      Application: "MyApp"

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.3.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.4.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, CostCenter]
        - Key: Application
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Tags, Application]

  DefaultPrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "IAM Baseline - Groups, Roles, MFA enforcement, Cross-account trust, CloudFormation execution roles"
Parameters:
  TrustedIdentityAccountId:
    Default: ""
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: ^(\d{12}|)$
    Description: "AWS Account ID of the Identity Management Account (12 digits)"
    ConstraintDescription: "Must be a 12-digit AWS account ID or empty"
  TrustedToolingAccountId:
    Default: ""
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: ^(\d{12}|)$
    Description: "AWS Account ID of the Tooling Management Account (12 digits)"
    ConstraintDescription: "Must be a 12-digit AWS account ID or empty"
Conditions:
  HasTrustedIdentity: !Not [!Equals [!Ref TrustedIdentityAccountId, ""]]
  HasTrustedTooling: !Not [!Equals [!Ref TrustedToolingAccountId, ""]]
Resources:
  # ---------- IAM Groups ----------
  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdmin
  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdmin
  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: IdentityAdmin

  # ---------- IAM Group Policies ----------
  PrivilegedAdminGroupAdminPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      Groups: [!Ref PrivilegedAdminGroup]
      PolicyName: AdminAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: "*"
            Resource: "*"
  RestrictedAdminGroupPowerUserPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      Groups: [!Ref RestrictedAdminGroup]
      PolicyName: PowerUserAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            NotAction:
              - "iam:*"
              - "organizations:*"
              - "account:*"
            Resource: "*"
  IdentityAdminGroupIAMFullAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      Groups: [!Ref IdentityAdminGroup]
      PolicyName: IAMFullAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: "iam:*"
            Resource: "*"

  # ---------- IAM Roles (same‑account, MFA required) ----------
  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: PrivilegedAdminRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "true"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AdminAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: "*"
                Resource: "*"
  RestrictedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: RestrictedAdminRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "true"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PowerUserAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                NotAction:
                  - "iam:*"
                  - "organizations:*"
                  - "account:*"
                Resource: "*"
  IdentityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: IdentityAdminRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "true"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: IAMFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: "iam:*"
                Resource: "*"

  # ---------- Cross‑account roles (conditional) ----------
  CrossAccountAdminRole:
    Condition: HasTrustedIdentity
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: CrossAccountAdminRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${TrustedIdentityAccountId}:root"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "true"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AdminWithSensitiveDeny
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: "*"
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - "aws-portal:*"
                  - "cloudhsm:*"
                  - "organizations:*"
                  - "iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole"
                Resource: "*"
  CrossAccountReadOnlyRole:
    Condition: HasTrustedTooling
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: CrossAccountReadOnlyRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${TrustedToolingAccountId}:root"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent": "true"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SensitiveDeny
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - "aws-portal:*"
                  - "cloudhsm:*"
                  - "organizations:*"
                  - "iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole"
                Resource: "*"

  # ---------- CloudFormation Execution Role ----------
  CloudFormationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: CloudFormationExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationStackManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "cloudformation:CreateStack"
                  - "cloudformation:UpdateStack"
                  - "cloudformation:DeleteStack"
                  - "cloudformation:DescribeStacks"
                  - "cloudformation:ValidateTemplate"
                  - "cloudformation:GetTemplate"
                  - "cloudformation:ListStackResources"
                  - "ec2:*"
                  - "s3:GetObject"
                  - "s3:PutObject"
                  - "s3:DeleteObject"
                  - "s3:ListBucket"
                  - "iam:PassRole"
                  - "iam:GetRole"
                  - "iam:CreateRole"
                  - "iam:PutRolePolicy"
                  - "iam:AttachRolePolicy"
                Resource: "*"

  # ---------- StackSet Execution Role ----------
  StackSetExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: StackSetExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: stacksets.cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "cloudformation:*"
                  - "iam:PassRole"
                Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  PrivilegedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of PrivilegedAdminRole"
    Value: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
  RestrictedAdminRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of RestrictedAdminRole"
    Value: !GetAtt RestrictedAdminRole.Arn
  IdentityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of IdentityAdminRole"
    Value: !GetAtt IdentityAdminRole.Arn
  CrossAccountAdminRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of CrossAccountAdminRole (only if Identity account provided)"
    Value: !If [HasTrustedIdentity, !GetAtt CrossAccountAdminRole.Arn, ""]
  CrossAccountReadOnlyRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of CrossAccountReadOnlyRole (only if Tooling account provided)"
    Value: !If [HasTrustedTooling, !GetAtt CrossAccountReadOnlyRole.Arn, ""]
  CloudFormationExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of CloudFormationExecutionRole"
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFormationExecutionRole.Arn
  StackSetExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of StackSetExecutionRole"
    Value: !GetAtt StackSetExecutionRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for VPC Flow Logs to S3 with security and compliance'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
    Description: Traffic type to log (ALL, ACCEPT, REJECT)
  LogFormat:
    Type: String
    Default: 'version account-id interface-id srcaddr dstaddr srcport dstport protocol packets bytes start end action log-status vpc-id subnet-id instance-id tcp-flags type pkt-srcaddr pkt-dstaddr'
    Description: Custom log format fields (space-separated)
  LogFilePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional prefix for flow log objects in S3 (trailing slash will be appended automatically if not empty)

Conditions:
  IsPrefixEmpty: !Equals [!Ref LogFilePrefix, '']

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPCFlowLogs

  FlowLogKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowLogDeliveryService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Description: Customer-managed KMS key for encrypting VPC Flow Logs
      Enabled: true

  FlowLogKmsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/VPCFlowLogsKey
      TargetKeyId: !Ref FlowLogKmsKey

  FlowLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogKmsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  FlowLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false
          - Sid: AllowLogDeliveryService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/${FlowLog}'

  FlowLogRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: VPCFlowLogRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FlowLogS3AndKMS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                Resource: !GetAtt FlowLogKmsKey.Arn

  FlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !If
        - IsPrefixEmpty
        - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}'
        - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/${LogFilePrefix}/'
      LogFormat: !Ref LogFormat
      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt FlowLogRole.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing flow logs
    Value: !Ref FlowLogBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Risk Management System for AWS Workloads'

Parameters:
  TableName:
    Type: String
    Default: RiskWorkloadTable
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: RiskAlertTopic
    Description: Name of the SNS topic
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag value

Resources:
  # DynamoDB Table
  RiskWorkloadTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Ref TableName
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # IAM Role for Lambda functions
  RiskLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RiskLambdaExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskWorkloadTable.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Lambda Function 1 - RiskDataCollector
  RiskDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: RiskDataCollector
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt RiskLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.14
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Placeholder for risk data collection logic
              print("Risk Data Collector invoked")
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Success')
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref TableName
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Lambda Function 2 - RiskAlertProcessor
  RiskAlertProcessor:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: RiskAlertProcessor
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt RiskLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.14
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Placeholder for risk alert processing logic
              print("Risk Alert Processor invoked")
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Success')
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref TableName
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Customer Managed KMS Key for SNS Topic Encryption
  RiskAlertCMK:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "Customer managed key for RiskAlertTopic encryption"
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow SNS service to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow SSM service to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # KMS Key Alias
  RiskAlertCMKAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/RiskAlertCMK
      TargetKeyId: !Ref RiskAlertCMK

  # SNS Topic (encrypted with CMK)
  RiskAlertTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName
      DisplayName: RiskAlertTopic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref RiskAlertCMK
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # SNS Topic Policy for SSM OpsCenter
  RiskTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskAlertTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskAlertTopic

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref RiskWorkloadTable
  TableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt RiskWorkloadTable.Arn
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt RiskLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref RiskAlertTopic
  RiskDataCollectorFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the RiskDataCollector Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RiskDataCollector.Arn
  RiskAlertProcessorFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the RiskAlertProcessor Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt RiskAlertProcessor.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation with VPC, managed instances, and admin instance preconfigured with scheduling tools.

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  # VPC
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabVPC

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnet
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group
  LabSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for lab EC2 instances (SSM only)"
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: "-1"
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/1"
        - IpProtocol: "-1"
          CidrIp: "128.0.0.0/1"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabSGSsmOnly

  # IAM Role for basic SSM managed instances
  SsmManagedInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: "SsmManagedInstanceRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  SsmManagedInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: "SsmManagedInstanceProfile"
      Roles:
        - !Ref SsmManagedInstanceRole

  # IAM Role for admin instance (with extra permissions)
  AdminInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: "AdminInstanceRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AdminSchedulerPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:ListStackResources
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResource
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                  - cloudformation:GetTemplate
                Resource: "*"

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: "AdminInstanceProfile"
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminInstanceRole

  # Launch Template for IMDSv2 only (BlockDeviceMappings on instances directly)
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  # Five dev instances
  DevInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SsmManagedInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: "0"
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance-1

  DevInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SsmManagedInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:

      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: "0"
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:

      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:

  DevInstance3:

    Properties:

      LaunchTemplate:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "IAM role for cross-service automation workflows (SSM, EC2, Monitoring)"

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Environment name for tagging and resource identification.

Resources:
  CrossServiceAutomationRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: "CrossServiceAutomationRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
                - monitoring.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "AWS:SourceAccount": !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore"
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess"
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CrossServiceAutomationInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "ssm:StartAutomationExecution"
                  - "ssm:DescribeAutomationExecutions"
                  - "ec2:CreateTags"
                  - "ec2:DescribeTags"
                  - "cloudwatch:PutMetricData"
                  - "cloudwatch:DescribeAlarms"
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "Cross-service automation"

Outputs:
  CrossServiceAutomationRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the CrossServiceAutomationRole"
    Value: !GetAtt CrossServiceAutomationRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CrossServiceAutomationRoleArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Creates an S3 bucket with event notifications to an SNS topic for all
  s3:ObjectCreated:* events. Includes an SNS topic policy that restricts
  publish permissions to the S3 service for the specific bucket and account.
  Both SNS and S3 use a customer managed KMS key for encryption; the bucket
  also has public access block enabled.

Resources:
  # KMS key used by both SNS topic and S3 bucket
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: Allow SNS Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  # S3 bucket with public access block, SSE-KMS, and event notifications
  NotificationBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Topic: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*

  # SNS topic with KMS encryption
  NotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  # Topic policy allowing S3 to publish, restricted to the bucket
  NotificationTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${NotificationBucket}
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for notifications
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: REST API Gateway integrated with SQS for ReceiveMessage

Resources:
  SQSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"

  SQSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/sqs-queue-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SQSEncryptionKey

  Queue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSEncryptionKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref Queue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}::/restapis/${ApiGatewayRestApi}"

  ApiGatewayRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SQSReceiveMessage
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage

    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:

    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi

      PathPart: messages

  ApiGatewayMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ApiGatewayResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: false
        method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: false
        method.request.querystring.QueueUrl: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage"
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: "method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages"
          integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: "method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds"
          integration.request.querystring.QueueUrl: !Sub "'${Queue}'"
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: "$input.path('$')"
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      StageName: prod

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref Queue
  ApiGatewayInvokeURL:
    Description: Invoke URL for the GET /messages endpoint
    Value: !Sub "https://${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/messages"
