AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure REST API Gateway with DynamoDB CRUD for Music data'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - test
      - prod

Resources:
  MusicTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: Music
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: Artist
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: Album
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: Artist
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: Album
          KeyType: RANGE
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: Artist-Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: Artist
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  ApiGatewayRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: dynamodb:PutItem
                Resource: !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: dynamodb:Query
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn
                  - !Sub "${MusicTable.Arn}/index/Artist-Index"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  MusicApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MusicApi
      FailOnWarnings: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  MusicResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MusicApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: music

  MusicArtistResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !Ref MusicResource
      PathPart: "{artist}"

  PostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: AWS_IAM
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/PutItem"
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "TableName": "Music",
              "Item": {
                "Artist": {"S": "$input.path('$.Artist')"},
                "Album": {"S": "$input.path('$.Album')"}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "Item created successfully"}'
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseModels:
            application/json: Empty

  MusicOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_TEMPLATES
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicArtistResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: AWS_IAM
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/Query"
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "TableName": "Music",
              "IndexName": "Artist-Index",
              "KeyConditionExpression": "Artist = :artist",
              "ExpressionAttributeValues": {
                ":artist": {"S": "$input.params('artist')"}
              },
              "Select": "ALL_ATTRIBUTES"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($items = $input.path('$.Items'))
                {
                  "items": [
                  #foreach($item in $items)
                    {
                      "Artist": "$item.Artist.S",
                      "Album": "$item.Album.S"
                    }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                  #end
                  ]
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseModels:
            application/json: Empty

  MusicArtistOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicArtistResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_TEMPLATES
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - PostMethod
      - GetMethod
      - MusicOptionsMethod
      - MusicArtistOptionsMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      StageName: prod
      StageDescription:
        Variables: {}
        Tags:
          - Key: Environment
            Value: !Ref Environment

  ApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      StageKeys:
        - RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          StageName: prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  UsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          Stage: prod
      Throttle:
        RateLimit: 100
        BurstLimit: 50
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  UsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref ApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref UsagePlan

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: API endpoint URL
    Value: !Sub "https://${MusicApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod"
  ApiKeyId:
    Description: API Key ID
    Value: !Ref ApiKey
  TableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Table Name
    Value: !Ref MusicTable

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a secure REST API Gateway integrated with Amazon SES for sending templated emails.

Parameters:
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: The name of the API Gateway stage

Resources:
  EmailApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: EmailApi
      Description: REST API integrated with SES for sending templated emails
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  EmailResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt EmailApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: email

  EmailRequestModel:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Model
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
      ContentType: application/json
      Name: EmailRequestModel
      Schema:
        type: object
        required:
          - to
          - from
          - subject
          - htmlBody
        properties:
          to:
            type: string
            format: email
            description: Recipient email address
          from:
            type: string
            format: email
            description: Sender email address
          subject:
            type: string
            minLength: 1
            description: Email subject
          htmlBody:
            type: string
            minLength: 1
            description: HTML content of the email

  RequestValidator:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RequestValidator
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
      Name: ValidateBody
      ValidateRequestBody: true
      ValidateRequestParameters: false

  PostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
      ResourceId: !Ref EmailResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      RequestValidatorId: !Ref RequestValidator
      RequestModels:
        application/json: !Ref EmailRequestModel
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:ses:action/SendEmail
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySesSendEmailRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            Action=SendEmail&Source=$util.urlEncode($input.path('$.from'))&Destination.ToAddresses.member.1=$util.urlEncode($input.path('$.to'))&Message.Subject.Data=$util.urlEncode($input.path('$.subject'))&Message.Body.Html.Data=$util.urlEncode($input.path('$.htmlBody'))
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "Email sent successfully"}'
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  ApiGatewaySesSendEmailRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApiGatewaySesSendEmailRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SesSendEmailPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ses:SendEmail
                Resource: '*'

  UsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref EmailApi
          Stage: !Ref StageName
      Description: Usage plan with throttling and monthly quota
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 1000
        RateLimit: 500
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: MONTH

  ApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Description: API key for accessing EmailApi
      Enabled: true
      GenerateDistinctId: true
      StageKeys:
        - RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
          StageName: !Ref StageName

  UsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref ApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref UsagePlan

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - PostMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailApi
      StageName: !Ref StageName

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Base URL of the API Gateway
    Value: !Sub https://${EmailApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}

  ApiKeyId:
    Description: ID of the generated API key
    Value: !Ref ApiKey

  UsagePlanId:
    Description: ID of the usage plan
    Value: !Ref UsagePlan

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'API Gateway integrated with Kinesis Data Streams'

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Name of the API Gateway stage

Resources:
  # KMS Key for Kinesis Stream Encryption
  KinesisStreamKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root account full access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Kinesis service to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: kinesis.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
      Description: KMS key for encrypting Kinesis stream data

  # Kinesis Stream
  Stream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: !GetAtt KinesisStreamKey.Arn
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  # IAM Role for API Gateway to call Kinesis
  ApiGatewayKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:ListStreams
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                Resource: !GetAtt Stream.Arn

  # IAM Role for API Gateway CloudWatch Logging
  ApiGatewayCloudWatchRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogs
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:GetLogEvents
                  - logs:FilterLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  # API Gateway Account (for CloudWatch logging)
  ApiGatewayAccount:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Account
    Properties:
      CloudWatchRoleArn: !GetAtt ApiGatewayCloudWatchRole.Arn

  # REST API
  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: KinesisApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  # Resource: /streams
  StreamsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: streams

  # Resource: /streams/{streamName}
  StreamNameResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamsResource
      PathPart: '{streamName}'

  # Resource: /streams/{streamName}/record
  RecordResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamNameResource
      PathPart: record

  # Resource: /streams/{streamName}/records
  RecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamNameResource
      PathPart: records

  # Resource: /streams/{streamName}/sharditerator
  ShardIteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamNameResource
      PathPart: sharditerator

  # GET /streams -> ListStreams
  ListStreamsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref StreamsResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/ListStreams'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($streams = $input.path('$.StreamNames'))

                  "streams": $streams

  # GET /streams/{streamName} -> DescribeStream
  DescribeStreamMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref StreamNameResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:

        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/DescribeStream'

        RequestParameters:

        IntegrationResponses:

            ResponseTemplates:

                  "streamDescription": $input.json('$.StreamDescription')
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  # PUT /streams/{streamName}/record -> PutRecord
  PutRecordMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordResource
      HttpMethod: PUT
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.streamName: true
        method.request.header.X-Partition-Key: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecord'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.path.streamName: method.request.path.streamName
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($data = $util.base64Encode($input.body))
            #set($partitionKey = $input.params('X-Partition-Key'))
            #if($partitionKey == "")
              #set($partitionKey = $context.requestId)
            #end
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamName')",
              "Data": "$data",
              "PartitionKey": "$partitionKey"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                {
                  "ShardId": "$input.path('$.ShardId')",
                  "SequenceNumber": "$input.path('$.SequenceNumber')"
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  # PUT /streams/{streamName}/records -> PutRecords
  PutRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordsResource
      HttpMethod: PUT
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.streamName: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecords'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.path.streamName: method.request.path.streamName
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($records = $input.path('$'))
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamName')",
              "Records": [
                #foreach($record in $records)
                  {
                    "Data": "$util.base64Encode($record.Data)",
                    "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey"
                  }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                #end
              ]
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                {
                  "FailedRecordCount": $input.path('$.FailedRecordCount'),
                  "Records": $input.json('$.Records')
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  # POST /streams/{streamName}/sharditerator -> GetShardIterator
  GetShardIteratorMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ShardIteratorResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.streamName: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetShardIterator'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.path.streamName: method.request.path.streamName
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamName')",
              "ShardId": "$input.path('$.shardId')",
              "ShardIteratorType": "$input.path('$.shardIteratorType')",
              #if($input.path('$.timestamp'))
                "Timestamp": $input.path('$.timestamp')
              #end
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                {
                  "ShardIterator": "$input.path('$.ShardIterator')"
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  # GET /streams/{streamName}/records -> GetRecords
  GetRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordsResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.streamName: true
        method.request.querystring.shard-iterator: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetRecords'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.path.streamName: method.request.path.streamName
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "ShardIterator": "$input.params('shard-iterator')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                {
                  "Records": $input.json('$.Records'),
                  "NextShardIterator": "$input.path('$.NextShardIterator')",
                  "MillisBehindLatest": $input.path('$.MillisBehindLatest')
                }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  # Deployment
  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - ListStreamsMethod
      - DescribeStreamMethod
      - PutRecordMethod
      - PutRecordsMethod
      - GetShardIteratorMethod
      - GetRecordsMethod

      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      StageName: !Ref StageName
      StageDescription:
        Variables:
          streamName: ''  # default empty, can be overridden
        CacheClusterEnabled: false
        CacheClusterSize: '0.5'
        MethodSettings:
          - ResourcePath: '/*'
            HttpMethod: '*'
            MetricsEnabled: true
            DataTraceEnabled: true
            LoggingLevel: INFO
            ThrottlingBurstLimit: 1000
            ThrottlingRateLimit: 500

Outputs:

    Value: !Sub 'https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}'

    Description: ARN of the Kinesis stream
    Value: !GetAtt Stream.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a basic EFS file system in a testing environment.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-testing-vpc

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs:
              Ref: AWS::Region
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-testing-subnet

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount target
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-testing-sg

  FileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-testing-fs
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  MountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref FileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup

Outputs:
  FileSystemId:
    Description: EFS File System ID
    Value: !Ref FileSystem
  MountTargetId:
    Description: EFS Mount Target ID
    Value: !Ref MountTarget

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated solution for managing AWS Security Hub controls, selectively disabling specific compliance checks (CIS Benchmarks and AWS Foundational Security Best Practices).'
Parameters:
  PermissionsBoundaryPolicyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Name of a managed policy to use as permissions boundary for the Lambda execution role. Leave empty for no boundary.'
  RetentionInDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    AllowedValues:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 5
      - 7
      - 14
      - 30
      - 60
      - 90
      - 120
      - 150
      - 180
      - 365
      - 400
      - 545
      - 731
      - 1827
      - 3653
    Description: 'Number of days to retain CloudWatch Logs for the Lambda function.'
  DisableCIS140Controls:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'
    Description: 'Set to true to disable all controls under CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark v1.4.0.'
  DisableFSBPControls:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'
    Description: 'Set to true to disable all controls under AWS Foundational Security Best Practices v1.0.0.'
Conditions:
  HasPermissionsBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionsBoundaryPolicyName, '']]
Resources:
  PermissionsBoundaryPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Condition: HasPermissionsBoundary
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Ref PermissionsBoundaryPolicyName
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [HasPermissionsBoundary, !Ref PermissionsBoundaryPolicy, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SecurityHubManagementPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - securityhub:BatchUpdateStandardsControlAssociations
                  - securityhub:ListStandardsControlAssociations
                  - securityhub:GetEnabledStandards
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
  LambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: '/aws/lambda/SecurityHubControlManager'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref RetentionInDays
  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    DependsOn:
      - LambdaLogGroup
    Properties:
      FunctionName: SecurityHubControlManager
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          LOG_GROUP_NAME: '/aws/lambda/SecurityHubControlManager'
          DisableCIS140Controls: !Ref DisableCIS140Controls
          DisableFSBPControls: !Ref DisableFSBPControls
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json, os, urllib.request, logging, boto3
          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
          securityhub = boto3.client('securityhub')

          def send_response(event, context, response_status, response_data, physical_resource_id=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': response_status,
                  'Reason': f"See details in CloudWatch Logs: {context.log_group_name}",
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or context.log_stream_name,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': response_data
              }
              json_response = json.dumps(response_body)
              req = urllib.request.Request(
                  response_url,
                  data=json_response.encode(),
                  headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
                  method='PUT'
              )
              try:
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                      logger.info(f"Response sent with status {response.status}")
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Failed to send response: {e}")

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              logger.info(f"Received event: {json.dumps(event)}")
              try:
                  if event['RequestType'] in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      manage_controls()
                  elif event['RequestType'] == 'Delete':
                      logger.info("Delete event - no action taken")
                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {'Message': 'Operation completed'})
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Error: {e}")
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {'Message': str(e)})

          def manage_controls():
              disable_cis = os.environ.get('DisableCIS140Controls', 'false').lower() == 'true'
              disable_fsbp = os.environ.get('DisableFSBPControls', 'false').lower() == 'true'
              if not disable_cis and not disable_fsbp:
                  logger.info("No controls to disable")
                  return
              paginator = securityhub.get_paginator('get_enabled_standards')
              standards = []
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  standards.extend(page['StandardsSubscriptions'])
              for standard in standards:
                  std_arn = standard['StandardsArn']
                  if disable_cis and 'cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v/1.4.0' in std_arn:
                      logger.info(f"Disabling CIS 1.4.0 controls for {std_arn}")
                      update_controls(standard['StandardsSubscriptionArn'], 'DISABLED')
                  if disable_fsbp and 'aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v/1.0.0' in std_arn:
                      logger.info(f"Disabling FSBP controls for {std_arn}")
                      update_controls(standard['StandardsSubscriptionArn'], 'DISABLED')

          def update_controls(subscription_arn, status):
              paginator = securityhub.get_paginator('list_standards_control_associations')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  for assoc in page['StandardsControlAssociations']:
                      if assoc['StandardsArn'] == subscription_arn:
                          control_id = assoc['SecurityControlId']
                          logger.info(f"Updating control {control_id} to {status}")
                          try:
                              securityhub.batch_update_standards_control_associations(
                                  StandardsControlAssociationUpdates=[
                                      {
                                          'StandardsArn': subscription_arn,
                                          'SecurityControlId': control_id,
                                          'AssociationStatus': status
                                      }
                                  ]
                              )
                          except Exception as e:
                              logger.error(f"Failed to update control {control_id}: {e}")
                              raise
  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
      Principal: 'cloudformation.amazonaws.com'
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*'
  CustomResource:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
      DisableCIS140Controls: !Ref DisableCIS140Controls
      DisableFSBPControls: !Ref DisableFSBPControls
Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function managing Security Hub controls
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
  LambdaLogGroupName:
    Description: CloudWatch Logs log group for Lambda function
    Value: !Ref LambdaLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Config setup with S3 bucket, SNS topic, and Lambda custom resource for retention and delivery frequency management.'

Parameters:
  DeliveryFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: TwentyFourHours
    AllowedValues:
      - One_Hour
      - TwentyFourHours
    Description: 'Frequency for delivering configuration snapshots to the S3 bucket.'
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2557
    Description: 'Number of days to retain configuration snapshots.'
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional ARN of an IAM policy to set as the permission boundary for the roles created.'

Conditions:
  HasPermissionBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, '']]

Resources:
  # Customer managed KMS key for encryption
  ConfigEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAdminPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Encryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Description: 'Customer managed KMS key for AWS Config SNS and S3 encryption'

  ConfigEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/config-encryption-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref ConfigEncryptionKey

  # S3 bucket for Config snapshots
  ConfigBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'config-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt ConfigEncryptionKey.Arn
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  # Bucket policy to enforce SSL
  ConfigBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ConfigBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${ConfigBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${ConfigBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

  # SNS topic for Config notifications
  ConfigSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub 'config-topic-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt ConfigEncryptionKey.Arn

  # Topic policy to allow Config service to publish
  ConfigSNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref ConfigSNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowConfigToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: config.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ConfigSNSTopic

  # IAM role for AWS Config
  ConfigRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: config.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConfigCustomPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub '${ConfigBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref ConfigSNSTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - config:Put*
                  - config:Get*
                  - config:List*
                  - config:Describe*
                  - config:Select*
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - sns:GetTopicAttributes
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [HasPermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  # Configuration Recorder (records all resources including global)
  ConfigRecorder:
    Type: AWS::Config::ConfigurationRecorder
    Properties:
      Name: default
      RoleARN: !GetAtt ConfigRole.Arn
      RecordingGroup:
        AllSupported: true
        IncludeGlobalResourceTypes: true

  # Delivery Channel (delivers snapshots to S3 and notifications to SNS)
  ConfigDeliveryChannel:
    Type: AWS::Config::DeliveryChannel
    DependsOn: ConfigRecorder
    Properties:
      Name: default
      S3BucketName: !Ref ConfigBucket
      SnsTopicARN: !Ref ConfigSNSTopic
      ConfigSnapshotDeliveryProperties:
        DeliveryFrequency: !Ref DeliveryFrequency

  # IAM role for the Lambda function
  LambdaConfigRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConfigUpdatePermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - config:PutConfigurationRecorder
                  - config:PutDeliveryChannel
                  - config:DescribeConfigurationRecorders
                  - config:DescribeDeliveryChannels
                  - config:PutRetentionConfiguration
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [HasPermissionBoundary, !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  # Lambda function to manage Config retention and delivery frequency
  ConfigManagementLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaConfigRole.Arn
      Timeout: 60
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse
          import logging
          import traceback
          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def handler(event, context):
              config = boto3.client('config')
              request_type = event['RequestType']
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              try:
                  recorder_name = props['RecorderName']
                  channel_name = props['DeliveryChannelName']
                  retention_days = int(props['RetentionDays'])
                  frequency = props['DeliveryFrequency']
                  s3_bucket = props['S3BucketName']
                  sns_topic = props['SnsTopicARN']

                  logger.info(f"Received {request_type} event for recorder {recorder_name}")

                  if request_type in ('Create', 'Update'):
                      config.put_retention_configuration(
                          RetentionPeriodInDays=retention_days
                      )
                      logger.info("Successfully updated retention configuration")
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
              except Exception as e:
                  reason = str(e)
                  logger.error(f"Error: {reason}\n{traceback.format_exc()}")
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {}, reason=reason)

  # Custom resource to invoke the Lambda during stack operations
  ConfigSettings:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt ConfigManagementLambda.Arn
      ServiceTimeout: 90
      RetentionDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      DeliveryFrequency: !Ref DeliveryFrequency
      RecorderName: !Ref ConfigRecorder
      DeliveryChannelName: !Ref ConfigDeliveryChannel
      S3BucketName: !Ref ConfigBucket
      SnsTopicARN: !Ref ConfigSNSTopic

Outputs:
  ConfigBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket storing AWS Config snapshots'
    Value: !Ref ConfigBucket
  ConfigSNSTopicARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for AWS Config notifications'
    Value: !Ref ConfigSNSTopic
  ConfigRecorderName:
    Description: 'Name of the AWS Config configuration recorder'
    Value: !Ref ConfigRecorder

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Account-wide IAM password policy managed via custom resource'

Parameters:
  MinimumPasswordLength:
    Type: String
    Default: '14'
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]+$'
    Description: Minimum number of characters allowed in a password (must be a number).
  RequireUppercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Require at least one uppercase character.
  RequireLowercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Require at least one lowercase character.
  RequireNumbers:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Require at least one number.
  RequireSymbols:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Require at least one non-alphanumeric symbol.
  MaxPasswordAge:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1095
    Description: Number of days after which a password expires.
  PasswordReusePrevention:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 24
    Description: Number of previous passwords that cannot be reused.
  AllowUsersToChangePassword:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Allow IAM users to change their own password.
  HardExpiry:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Description: Force users to change their password at next sign-in if expired.
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional ARN of an IAM policy to use as a permission boundary for the Lambda role.

Conditions:
  HasPermissionBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionBoundaryArn, '']]

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: IamPasswordPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If
        - HasPermissionBoundary
        - !Ref PermissionBoundaryArn
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'

  PasswordPolicyFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              iam = boto3.client('iam')
              request_type = event['RequestType']
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              physical_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', 'PasswordPolicy')

              try:
                  if request_type in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      # Build policy parameters
                      params = {}
                      params['MinimumPasswordLength'] = int(props['MinimumPasswordLength'])
                      params['RequireUppercaseCharacters'] = props['RequireUppercaseCharacters'].lower() == 'true'
                      params['RequireLowercaseCharacters'] = props['RequireLowercaseCharacters'].lower() == 'true'
                      params['RequireNumbers'] = props['RequireNumbers'].lower() == 'true'
                      params['RequireSymbols'] = props['RequireSymbols'].lower() == 'true'
                      params['MaxPasswordAge'] = int(props['MaxPasswordAge'])
                      params['PasswordReusePrevention'] = int(props['PasswordReusePrevention'])
                      params['AllowUsersToChangePassword'] = props['AllowUsersToChangePassword'].lower() == 'true'
                      params['HardExpiry'] = props['HardExpiry'].lower() == 'true'

                      iam.update_account_password_policy(**params)
                      response_data = {'PolicySet': 'Created/Updated'}
                  elif request_type == 'Delete':
                      iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                      response_data = {'PolicySet': 'Deleted'}

                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, response_data, physical_id)
              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Error': str(e)}, physical_id)

  PasswordPolicyCustomResource:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyFunction.Arn
      MinimumPasswordLength: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
      RequireUppercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireUppercaseCharacters
      RequireLowercaseCharacters: !Ref RequireLowercaseCharacters
      RequireNumbers: !Ref RequireNumbers
      RequireSymbols: !Ref RequireSymbols
      MaxPasswordAge: !Ref MaxPasswordAge
      PasswordReusePrevention: !Ref PasswordReusePrevention
      AllowUsersToChangePassword: !Ref AllowUsersToChangePassword
      HardExpiry: !Ref HardExpiry

Outputs:
  PasswordPolicyStatus:
    Description: Status of the account password policy
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyCustomResource.PolicySet

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Centralized alerting SNS topics with fallback and monitoring"

Parameters:
  EmailEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional email endpoint for primary topic subscription"
  HTTPSEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional HTTPS endpoint for primary topic subscription"
  FallbackEmailEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional email endpoint for fallback topic subscription"

Conditions:
  HasEmailSubscription: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EmailEndpoint, ""]]
  HasHTTPSubscription: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HTTPSEndpoint, ""]]
  HasFallbackEmail: !Not [!Equals [!Ref FallbackEmailEndpoint, ""]]

Resources:
  AlertTopicKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
            Resource: "*"

  PrimaryAlertTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TopicName: "PrimaryAlertTopic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertTopicKey

  FallbackAlertTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TopicName: "FallbackAlertTopic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertTopicKey

  PrimaryTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
                - rds.amazonaws.com
                - s3.amazonaws.com
                - budgets.amazonaws.com
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - monitoring.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sns:Publish"
            Resource: "*"

  FallbackTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sns:Publish"
            Resource: "*"

  PrimaryEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasEmailSubscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailEndpoint

  PrimaryHTTPSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasHTTPSubscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref HTTPSEndpoint
      DeliveryPolicy:
        healthyRetryPolicy:
          maxRetries: 3
          minDelayTarget: 20
          maxDelayTarget: 20
          numRetries: 3
          numNoDelayRetries: 0
          backoffFunction: linear

  FailedNotificationAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "FailedNotificationAlarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when primary SNS topic has failed notifications"
      Namespace: "AWS/SNS"
      MetricName: "NumberOfNotificationsFailed"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt PrimaryAlertTopic.TopicName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackAlertTopic

  FallbackEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasFallbackEmail
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmailEndpoint

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS Batch environment for containerized batch jobs

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet (NAT Gateway)
  PrivateSubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the private subnet (Batch compute)
  ImageName:
    Type: String
    Default: amazonlinux:latest
    Description: Docker image for job definition

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchIGW

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchPublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: AttachGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCIDR
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchPublicSubnet

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchNATGateway

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchPrivateRouteTable

  PrivateDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetCIDR
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchPrivateSubnet

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Batch compute instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchSG

  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Batch S3 bucket
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT

  KmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/batch-s3-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KmsKey

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KmsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: BatchDataBucket

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyPublicAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalArn': !GetAtt BatchInstanceRole.Arn

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BatchServiceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole

  BatchInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BatchInstanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ContainerRegistryReadOnly
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AndKMSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}'
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:key/${KmsKey}'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: BatchInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref BatchInstanceRole

  ComputeEnvironment:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        InstanceRole: !Ref InstanceProfile
        InstanceTypes:
          - m5.large
        MinvCpus: 0
        DesiredvCpus: 0
        MaxvCpus: 256
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PrivateSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        AllocationStrategy: BEST_FIT
      State: ENABLED

  JobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref ComputeEnvironment
      State: ENABLED

  JobDefinition:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref ImageName
        Command:
          - sh
          - -c
          - !Sub |
            yum install -y aws-cli
            aws s3 cp s3://${S3Bucket}/input.txt /tmp/input.txt
            cp /tmp/input.txt /tmp/output.txt
            aws s3 cp /tmp/output.txt s3://${S3Bucket}/output/output.txt
        Vcpus: 1
        Memory: 512
      RetryStrategy:
        Attempts: 1

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-contained web server environment with VPC, EC2, S3, Apache, PHP'

Parameters:
  EnvName:
    Type: String
    Default: webserver
    Description: Environment name used for tagging

  ZipFileKey:
    Type: String
    Default: content.zip
    Description: S3 object key for the web content ZIP file

  LatestAmi:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterLabels:
      EnvName:
        default: "Environment Name"
      ZipFileKey:
        default: "ZIP File Key"
      LatestAmi:
        default: "AMI ID"

Conditions: {}

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-vpc"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-igw"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Subnet (no auto-public-IP)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-public-subnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group (no explicit egress rules — relies on default allow-all)
  WebSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-web-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # IAM Role for EC2
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KMSDecryptForS3Content
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt ContentBucketKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-ec2-role"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # Instance Profile
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # KMS Key for S3 bucket encryption
  ContentBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
      Description: KMS key for web content S3 bucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-content-bucket-key"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # S3 Bucket (SSE-KMS)
  ContentBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ContentBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-content-bucket"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # EC2 Instance
  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmi
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WebServerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WebServerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebSecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -ex
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php
          systemctl enable httpd
          systemctl start httpd
          # Download content from S3
          aws s3 cp s3://${ContentBucket}/${ZipFileKey} /var/www/html/content.zip
          unzip -o /var/www/html/content.zip -d /var/www/html/
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          chmod -R 755 /var/www/html
          # Clean up zip
          rm -f /var/www/html/content.zip
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-web-server"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # Launch Template with MetadataOptions (IMDSv2)
  WebServerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-web-launch-template"
            - Key: Environment
              Value: !Ref EnvName
            - Key: Project
              Value: WebServer

  # Elastic IP for web server
  WebServerEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvName}-web-eip"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvName
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebServer

  # Associate EIP with instance
  WebServerEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref WebServerInstance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt WebServerEIP.AllocationId

Outputs:
  InstancePublicDns:
    Description: Public DNS name of the web server instance
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicDnsName

  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket name where the ZIP file should be uploaded
    Value: !Ref ContentBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic AWS Lambda function with inline Node.js code and CloudWatch logging'
Parameters:
  FunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyLambdaFunction
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Path: /
  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref FunctionName
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs22.x
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return { value: event.key1 || 'No key1 provided' };
          };
Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with a mock /hello endpoint (must be deployed in us-east-1)

Resources:
  ApiGatewayRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  ApiGatewayResourceHello:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      ParentId: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi

  ApiGatewayMethodHelloGet:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      HttpMethod: GET
      ResourceId: !Ref ApiGatewayResourceHello
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: ANY
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message":"hello world"}'
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayMethodHelloGet
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      StageName: ''

  ApiGatewayStageProd:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      StageName: prod
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiGatewayDeployment

  WebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: CloudFrontWebACL
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: CloudFrontWebACL

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayStageProd
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub "${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            OriginPath: "/prod"
            CustomOriginConfig:
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
        Enabled: true
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          MinTTL: 0
          MaxTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 0
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: false
            Headers:
              - Accept
              - Authorization
              - Content-Type
          SmoothStreaming: false
          Compress: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_All
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2025
        Restrictions:
          GeoRestriction:
            RestrictionType: none
        WebACLId: !GetAtt WebACL.Arn

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayInvokeURL:
    Description: API Gateway production stage invoke URL for /hello
    Value: !Sub "https://${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Create an IAM governance role with configurable permission boundary enforcement
  for developer-managed IAM resources.  The role conditionally applies strict
  naming, tag, and boundary constraints based on a parameter toggle.

Parameters:
  StrictEnforcement:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'true'
    Description: >
      When true, developers must use the required naming prefix, Owner tag,
      and attach the DefaultPermissionBoundary.  When false, full IAM access
      is granted.
  RoleNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    Description: >
      Required prefix for the name of any IAM role or policy created by
      developers using the governance role.
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: TeamA
    Description: >
      Value for the mandatory Owner tag that must be applied to all
      developer-created IAM resources.

Conditions:
  IsStrict: !Equals [!Ref StrictEnforcement, 'true']

Resources:
  DefaultPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DefaultPermissionBoundary
      Description: >
        Permission boundary that restricts developer-created roles to S3
        and read-only IAM operations.
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'

  DeveloperGovernanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: DeveloperGovernanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GovernanceAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement: !If
              - IsStrict
              -  # Restricted branch – enforce naming, tags, boundary
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:CreateRole
                    - iam:CreatePolicy
                  Resource: '*'
                  Condition:
                    StringLike:
                      iam:ResourceName: !Sub '${RoleNamePrefix}*'
                    ForAllValues:StringLike:
                      aws:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                    StringEquals:
                      iam:PermissionsBoundary: !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - iam:UpdateRole
                    - iam:CreatePolicyVersion
                    - iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion
                    - iam:DeleteRole
                    - iam:DeletePolicy
                    - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                    - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                    - iam:PutRolePolicy
                    - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                    - iam:GetRole
                    - iam:GetPolicy
                    - iam:ListRoles
                    - iam:ListPolicies
                    - iam:ListRolePolicies
                    - iam:GetRolePolicy
                  Resource: '*'
                  Condition:
                    StringLike:
                      iam:ResourceName: !Sub '${RoleNamePrefix}*'
                    StringEquals:
                      iam:ResourceTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action: iam:PassRole
                  Resource: !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary
              -  # Permissive branch – full IAM access
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action: iam:*
                  Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  GovernanceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the governance role for developers.
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperGovernanceRole.Arn
  DefaultBoundaryPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the default permission boundary policy.
    Value: !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary
