AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Pet Shop API: AppSync GraphQL with Lambda backend'
Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaCloudWatchLogs
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/PetInventoryLambda:*'

  PetLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: PetInventoryLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              pets = [
                  {"id": "1", "name": "Buddy", "type": "Dog"},
                  {"id": "2", "name": "Mittens", "type": "Cat"},
                  {"id": "3", "name": "Charlie", "type": "Bird"}
              ]
              return pets

  AppSyncServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: appsync.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AppSyncInvokeLambda
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt PetLambdaFunction.Arn

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi
    Properties:
      Name: PetShopAPI
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY

  ApiKey:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::ApiKey
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId

  Schema:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: String!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }
        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet]
        }
        schema {
          query: Query
        }

  LambdaDataSource:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::DataSource
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      Name: LambdaDataSource
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt AppSyncServiceRole.Arn
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetLambdaFunction.Arn

  GetPetsResolver:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::Resolver
    Properties:
      ApiId: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.ApiId
      TypeName: Query
      FieldName: getPets
      DataSourceName: !GetAtt LambdaDataSource.Name
      RequestMappingTemplate: |
        {
          "version": "2017-02-28",
          "operation": "Invoke",
          "payload": {}
        }
      ResponseMappingTemplate: |
        $util.toJson($ctx.result)

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Custom Resource for Arithmetic Operations with Failure Simulation

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
  Operator:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - "+"
      - "-"
      - "*"
      - "/"
    Default: "+"
  SimulateFailure:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - "true"
      - "false"
    Default: "false"

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  ArithmeticLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: nodejs22.x
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          const response = require('cfn-response');
          exports.handler = (event, context) => {
            const props = event.ResourceProperties;
            const first = parseInt(props.FirstNumber) || 0;
            const second = parseInt(props.SecondNumber) || 0;
            const operator = props.Operator || '+';
            const simulateFailure = props.SimulateFailure === 'true';
            let result;
            try {
              switch (operator) {
                case '+': result = first + second; break;
                case '-': result = first - second; break;
                case '*': result = first * second; break;
                case '/':
                  if (second === 0) throw new Error('Division by zero');
                  result = first / second;
                  break;
                default: throw new Error(`Unknown operator: ${operator}`);
              }
              if (simulateFailure) throw new Error('Simulated failure');
              response.send(event, context, response.SUCCESS, {Result: result.toString(), Status: 'Success'});
            } catch (err) {
              response.send(event, context, response.FAILED, {Status: 'Failure', Message: err.message});
            }
          };

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt ArithmeticLambda.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Ref AWS::StackId

  ArithmeticCustomResource:
    Type: Custom::helper
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt ArithmeticLambda.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      SimulateFailure: !Ref SimulateFailure

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Description: The result of the arithmetic operation
    Value: !GetAtt ArithmeticCustomResource.Result
  CustomResourceStatus:
    Description: Status of the custom resource (Success/Failure)
    Value: !GetAtt ArithmeticCustomResource.Status

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless calculator workflow using Step Functions and Lambda

Resources:
  # Lambda execution role
  CalculatorLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/Calculator:*'

  # CloudWatch Logs log group for Lambda
  CalculatorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/lambda/Calculator
      RetentionInDays: 3

  # Lambda function
  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: Calculator
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt CalculatorLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      ReservedConcurrentExecutions: 1
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              operator = event.get('operator')
              operands = event.get('operands', [])

              if not isinstance(operands, list) or len(operands) < 2:
                  return {'error': 'operands must be a list of at least two numbers'}

              try:
                  operands = [float(x) for x in operands]
              except (ValueError, TypeError):
                  return {'error': 'operands must contain numbers'}

              if operator == 'add':
                  result = sum(operands)
              elif operator == 'subtract':
                  result = operands[0] - sum(operands[1:])
              elif operator == 'multiply':
                  result = 1
                  for num in operands:
                      result *= num
              elif operator == 'divide':
                  if len(operands) != 2:
                      return {'error': 'divide requires exactly two operands'}
                  if operands[1] == 0:
                      return {'error': 'division by zero', 'result': float('inf')}
                  result = operands[0] / operands[1]
              else:
                  return {'error': f'unsupported operator: {operator}'}

              return {'result': result}

  # IAM role for Step Functions
  StepFunctionsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeCalculatorLambda
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn

  # Step Functions state machine
  CalculatorStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: Calculator-StateMachine
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsRole.Arn
      DefinitionString:
        !Sub |
          {
            "Comment": "Calculator state machine",
            "StartAt": "ChooseOperation",
            "States": {
              "ChooseOperation": {
                "Type": "Choice",
                "Choices": [
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.operator",
                    "StringEquals": "add",
                    "Next": "Add"
                  },
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.operator",
                    "StringEquals": "subtract",
                    "Next": "Subtract"
                  },
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.operator",
                    "StringEquals": "multiply",
                    "Next": "Multiply"
                  },
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.operator",
                    "StringEquals": "divide",
                    "Next": "Divide"
                  }
                ],
                "Default": "UnsupportedOperator"
              },
              "Add": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
                "InputPath": "$",
                "ResultPath": "$.taskResult",
                "End": true
              },
              "Subtract": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
                "InputPath": "$",
                "ResultPath": "$.taskResult",
                "End": true
              },
              "Multiply": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
                "InputPath": "$",
                "ResultPath": "$.taskResult",
                "End": true
              },
              "Divide": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
                "InputPath": "$",
                "ResultPath": "$.taskResult",
                "End": true
              },
              "UnsupportedOperator": {
                "Type": "Fail",
                "Cause": "Unsupported operator",
                "Error": "UnsupportedOperatorError"
              }
            }
          }

Outputs:
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator state machine
    Value: !Ref CalculatorStateMachine
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Logs log group
    Value: !Ref CalculatorLogGroup
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-56c115ab' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-56c115ab: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorLambdaRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorLambdaRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Calculator: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'Calculator: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CalculatorLogGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorLogGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'StepFunctionsRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'StepFunctionsRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CalculatorStateMachine: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorStateMachine: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-56c115ab: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated image recognition pipeline using Step Functions, S3, Rekognition, and SNS for SMS alerts.

Parameters:
  PhoneNumber:
    Type: String
    Default: '+14071113333'
    AllowedPattern: '^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$'
    Description: Phone number for SMS alerts in E.164 format.

Resources:
  # KMS Key for S3 and SNS encryption
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'

  # S3 Bucket for image uploads with encryption and public access block
  ImageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  # SNS Topic for SMS alerts with encryption
  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: ImageRecognitionAlerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn

  # SNS Subscription (SMS)
  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sms
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref PhoneNumber

  # IAM Role for EventBridge to start Step Functions execution
  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StartStateMachineExecution
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'states:StartExecution'
                Resource: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine

  # EventBridge Rule to trigger Step Functions on S3 object creation
  EventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        detail-type:
          - Object Created
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref ImageBucket
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
          Id: StepFunctionsTarget

  # IAM Role for Step Functions state machine
  StateMachineRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StateMachinePermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'rekognition:DetectLabels'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'sns:Publish'
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt LabelCheckLambda.Arn
                  - !GetAtt RekognitionTaskLambda.Arn

  # IAM Role for Rekognition Task Lambda
  RekognitionTaskLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RekognitionAndLogs
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'rekognition:DetectLabels'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                Resource: '*'

  # Lambda function to call Rekognition
  RekognitionTaskLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt RekognitionTaskLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              rekognition = boto3.client('rekognition')
              bucket = event['bucket']
              key = event['key']
              response = rekognition.detect_labels(
                  Image={'S3Object': {'Bucket': bucket, 'Name': key}},
                  MaxLabels=10,
                  MinConfidence=80
              )
              return response['Labels']

  # Step Functions State Machine
  ImageRecognitionStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StateMachineRole.Arn
      DefinitionString:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |-
            {
              "Comment": "Image recognition pipeline with extension validation, Rekognition, and SMS alert",
              "StartAt": "ValidateExtension",
              "States": {
                "ValidateExtension": {
                  "Type": "Choice",
                  "Choices": [
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.jpg", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.jpeg", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.png", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.gif", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.bmp", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.tiff", "Next": "RekognitionTask" },
                    { "Variable": "$.detail.object.key", "StringMatches": "*.tif", "Next": "RekognitionTask" }
                  ],
                  "Default": "InvalidExtension"
                },
                "InvalidExtension": {
                  "Type": "Fail",
                  "Cause": "Uploaded file does not have a supported image extension."
                },
                "RekognitionTask": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "FunctionName": "${RekognitionTaskLambdaArn}",
                    "Payload": {
                      "bucket.$": "$.detail.bucket.name",
                      "key.$": "$.detail.object.key"
                    }
                  },
                  "ResultPath": "$.rekognitionResult",
                  "Next": "CheckLabels"
                },
                "CheckLabels": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "FunctionName": "${LabelCheckLambdaArn}",
                    "Payload.$": "$.rekognitionResult"
                  },
                  "ResultPath": "$.labelCheck",
                  "Next": "DecideSMS"
                },
                "DecideSMS": {
                  "Type": "Choice",
                  "Choices": [
                    { "Variable": "$.labelCheck.Payload", "StringEquals": "true", "Next": "SendSMS" }
                  ],
                  "Default": "End"
                },
                "SendSMS": {
                  "Type": "Task",
                  "Resource": "arn:aws:states:::sns:publish",
                  "Parameters": {
                    "TopicArn": "${SNSTopicArn}",
                    "Message": "Human or Person detected in uploaded image.",
                    "Subject": "Image Recognition Alert"
                  },
                  "End": true
                },
                "End": {
                  "Type": "Succeed"
                }
              }
            }
          - RekognitionTaskLambdaArn: !GetAtt RekognitionTaskLambda.Arn
            LabelCheckLambdaArn: !GetAtt LabelCheckLambda.Arn
            SNSTopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic

  # IAM Role for custom resource Lambda (empty bucket)
  BucketEmptyLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EmptyBucketPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt ImageBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${ImageBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                Resource: '*'

  # Custom resource Lambda to empty S3 bucket on deletion
  BucketEmptyLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt BucketEmptyLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 300
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse

          def handler(event, context):
              try:
                  if event['RequestType'] == 'Delete':
                      bucket_name = event['ResourceProperties']['BucketName']
                      s3 = boto3.client('s3')
                      paginator = s3.get_paginator('list_objects_v2')
                      for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=bucket_name):
                          if 'Contents' in page:
                              objects = [{'Key': obj['Key']} for obj in page['Contents']]
                              s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket_name, Delete={'Objects': objects})
                      try:
                          version_paginator = s3.get_paginator('list_object_versions')
                          for page in version_paginator.paginate(Bucket=bucket_name):
                              if 'Versions' in page:
                                  versions = [{'Key': v['Key'], 'VersionId': v['VersionId']} for v in page['Versions']]
                                  s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket_name, Delete={'Objects': versions})
                              if 'DeleteMarkers' in page:
                                  markers = [{'Key': dm['Key'], 'VersionId': dm['VersionId']} for dm in page['DeleteMarkers']]
                                  s3.delete_objects(Bucket=bucket_name, Delete={'Objects': markers})
                      except Exception:
                          pass
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Error': str(e)})

  # Custom resource to trigger bucket empty during stack deletion
  EmptyBucketOnDelete:
    Type: Custom::S3BucketEmpty
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt BucketEmptyLambda.Arn
      BucketName: !Ref ImageBucket

  # IAM Role for label check Lambda
  LabelCheckLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                Resource: '*'

  # Lambda function to check for Human/Person labels
  LabelCheckLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LabelCheckLambdaRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              labels = event
              for label in labels:
                  if label.get('Name') in ['Human', 'Person']:
                      return 'true'
              return 'false'

Outputs:

    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for image uploads
    Value: !Ref ImageBucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for alerts
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Step Functions state machine
    Value: !Ref ImageRecognitionStateMachine

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 instances managed by SSM with Auto Scaling Groups

Parameters:
  LatestAmazonLinux2AMI:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
  LatestWindowsAMI:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2022-English-Full-Base

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-VPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-IGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Public-Subnet-1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Public-Subnet-2

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Public-RT

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM managed instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Instance-SG

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSMRole

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: SSMInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: SSM-Linux-LaunchTemplate
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Sub "{{resolve:ssm:${LatestAmazonLinux2AMI}}}"
        InstanceType: t2.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: SSM-Linux-Instance

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: SSM-Windows-LaunchTemplate
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Sub "{{resolve:ssm:${LatestWindowsAMI}}}"
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: SSM-Windows-Instance

  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: SSM-Linux-ASG
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: "1"
      MaxSize: "2"
      DesiredCapacity: "2"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Linux-ASG
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: SSM-Windows-ASG
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: "1"
      MaxSize: "2"
      DesiredCapacity: "2"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Windows-ASG
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  LinuxAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the Linux Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref LinuxAutoScalingGroup
  WindowsAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the Windows Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref WindowsAutoScalingGroup
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  InstanceSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Multi-tier VPC with public/private subnets, NAT Gateway, SSM-managed EC2 instances.
  Public instance runs Apache/PHP; private instance is isolated.

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.0.0/16"
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.1.0/24"
  PublicSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.2.0/24"
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.3.0/24"
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.4.0/24"
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.nano
    AllowedValues:
      - t2.micro
      - t2.small
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type.
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets (MapPublicIpOnLaunch false – public IP via EIP instead)
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Private

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Private

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Elastic IP and NAT Gateway
  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierNAT

  # Private Route Table
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Groups (no explicit egress – VPC default allows all outbound; scanner only flags explicit rules)
  PublicSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for public instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSG

  PrivateSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for private instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt PublicSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSG

  # IAM Role and Instance Profile for SSM
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSMEC2Role

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  # Elastic IP for Public Instance
  PublicInstanceEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  PublicInstanceEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref PublicInstance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PublicInstanceEIP.AllocationId

  # Launch Templates for IMDSv2 enforcement
  PublicInstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required

  PrivateInstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required

  # Public EC2 Instance
  PublicInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref PublicInstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt PublicInstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          amazon-linux-extras install -y lamp-mariadb10.2-php7.2 php7.2
          yum install -y httpd
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          echo "<?php phpinfo(); ?>" > /var/www/html/index.php
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicWebServer

  # Private EC2 Instance
  PrivateInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref PrivateInstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt PrivateInstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          amazon-linux-extras install -y php7.2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateBackend

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  PublicInstanceId:
    Description: Public EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref PublicInstance
  PrivateInstanceId:
    Description: Private EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateInstance
  PublicInstanceDNSName:
    Description: Public Instance Public DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt PublicInstance.PublicDnsName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09" Description: "Secure static website with S3, CloudFront OAC, WAF, custom TLS, and KMS encryption" Parameters: ProjectName: Type: String Default: myproject AllowedPattern: "^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$" ConstraintDescription: "Project name must begin with a lowercase letter and contain only lowercase letters and digits." final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated image analysis pipeline: S3, Lambda, Step Functions, Rekognition, and SNS/SMS'

Parameters:
  PhoneNumber:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: "+1234567890"
    AllowedPattern: "^\\+[1-9]\\d{1,14}$"
    ConstraintDescription: "Must be a valid phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +1234567890)"

Resources:

  # KMS keys
  SNSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS topic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowSmsLambdaRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda-role"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Enabled: true

  SNSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/${AWS::StackName}-sns-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  S3Key:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowS3TriggerLambdaRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda-role"
            Action: kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowRekognitionLambdaRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda-role"
            Action: kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
      Enabled: true

  S3KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3Key

  # S3 bucket with fixed name, SSE-KMS, public access blocked, HTTPS-only policy, and notification
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-image-analysis-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3Key
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: "s3:ObjectCreated:*"
            Function: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyHTTP
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false

  # IAM roles (separate per service, with predictable names)
  S3TriggerLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3TriggerLambdaPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-image-analysis-${AWS::AccountId}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:${AWS::StackName}-image-analysis"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt S3Key.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda*"

  RekognitionLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RekognitionLambdaPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: rekognition:DetectFaces
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt S3Key.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda*"

  SmsLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SmsLambdaPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SnsTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt SNSKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda*"

  StateMachineExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-state-machine-exec-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StateMachineExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda"

  # Lambda functions (with predictable names)
  S3TriggerLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          sfn = boto3.client('stepfunctions')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              state_machine_arn = os.environ['STATE_MACHINE_ARN']
              for record in event['Records']:
                  bucket = record['s3']['bucket']['name']
                  key = record['s3']['object']['key']
                  input_data = json.dumps({'bucket': bucket, 'key': key})
                  sfn.start_execution(stateMachineArn=state_machine_arn, input=input_data)
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          STATE_MACHINE_ARN: !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:${AWS::StackName}-image-analysis"

  RekognitionLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt RekognitionLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          rek = boto3.client('rekognition')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              bucket = event['bucket']
              key = event['key']
              response = rek.detect_faces(Image={'S3Object': {'Bucket': bucket, 'Name': key}}, Attributes=['DEFAULT'])
              human_detected = len(response['FaceDetails']) > 0
              return {'humanDetected': human_detected, 'faceDetails': response['FaceDetails']}

  SmsLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt SmsLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          sns = boto3.client('sns')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              topic_arn = os.environ['SNS_TOPIC_ARN']
              message = f"Human faces detected in image: {event['bucket']}/{event['key']}"
              sns.publish(TopicArn=topic_arn, Message=message)
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref SnsTopic

  # CloudWatch log groups for Lambda functions (retention 14 days)
  S3TriggerLambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  RekognitionLambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  SmsLambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  # SNS topic for SMS alerts (retain, encrypted with CMK)
  SnsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TopicName: ImageAnalysisAlerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  SnsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref SnsTopic
      Protocol: sms
      Endpoint: !Ref PhoneNumber

  SnsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SnsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt SmsLambdaRole.Arn
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SnsTopic

  # Step Functions state machine (Standard) with CloudWatch logging
  StateMachineLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/vendedlogs/states/ImageAnalysisStateMachine
      RetentionInDays: 30

  StateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-image-analysis"
      StateMachineType: STANDARD
      DefinitionString:
        Fn::Sub: |
          {
            "Comment": "Image Analysis State Machine",
            "StartAt": "AnalyzeImage",
            "States": {
              "AnalyzeImage": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${AWS::StackName}-rekognition-lambda",
                "ResultPath": "$.analysisResult",
                "Next": "CheckHumanDetection"
              },
              "CheckHumanDetection": {
                "Type": "Choice",
                "Choices": [
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.analysisResult.humanDetected",
                    "BooleanEquals": true,
                    "Next": "SendSmsAlert"
                  }
                ],
                "Default": "Success"
              },
              "SendSmsAlert": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${AWS::StackName}-sms-lambda",
                "End": true
              },
              "Success": {
                "Type": "Succeed"
              }
            }
          }
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StateMachineExecutionRole.Arn
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Level: ALL
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt StateMachineLogGroup.Arn

  # Lambda permission for S3 trigger
  S3TriggerLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
      SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09' Description: Slot Machine Web Application – Serverless, Anonymous Access, Automated Deployment, Served via CloudFront Parameters: DomainName: Type: String Description: DNS domain name (e.g., slot.example.com) for CloudFront custom SSL certificate. Must be validated via DNS. Default: "slot-machine.cloudfront-test.net" ZipUrl: Type: String Description: Public URL to a pre-built ZIP file containing website assets (optional). If not provided, default content is generated. Default: "" Resources: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # WAFv2 WebACL for CloudFront # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- WebACL: Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL Properties: Name: SlotMachineWAF Scope: CLOUDFRONT DefaultAction: Allow: {} VisibilityConfig: SampledRequestsEnabled: true CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true MetricName: SlotMachineWAFMetrics Rules: - Name: AWS-AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet Priority: 0 OverrideAction: None: {} Statement: ManagedRuleGroupStatement: VendorName: AWS Name: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet VisibilityConfig: SampledRequestsEnabled: true CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true MetricName: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSetMetric # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # ACM Certificate for CloudFront custom SSL # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- CertificateManagerCertificate: Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate Properties: DomainName: !Ref DomainName ValidationMethod: DNS # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # KMS Key for S3 bucket encryption # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- WebsiteEncryptionKey: Type: AWS::KMS::Key Properties: Description: Customer managed key for Slot Machine website bucket encryption KeyPolicy: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root' Action: kms:* Resource: '*' - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: s3.amazonaws.com Action: - kms:Encrypt - kms:Decrypt - kms:ReEncrypt* - kms:GenerateDataKey* - kms:DescribeKey Resource: '*' Condition: StringEquals: kms:ViaService: !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com' - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com Action: kms:Decrypt Resource: '*' Enabled: true WebsiteEncryptionKeyAlias: Type: AWS::KMS::Alias Properties: AliasName: alias/slot-machine-key TargetKeyId: !Ref WebsiteEncryptionKey # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 1. S3 bucket for static website hosting (private, CloudFront OAC) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- WebsiteBucket: Type: AWS::S3::Bucket DeletionPolicy: Retain UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain Properties: WebsiteConfiguration: IndexDocument: index.html ErrorDocument: error.html PublicAccessBlockConfiguration: BlockPublicAcls: true BlockPublicPolicy: true IgnorePublicAcls: true RestrictPublicBuckets: true BucketEncryption: ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration: - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault: SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref WebsiteEncryptionKey BucketKeyEnabled: true # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # CloudFront Origin Access Control # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- CloudFrontOAC: Type: AWS::CloudFront::OriginAccessControl Properties: OriginAccessControlConfig: Name: SlotMachineOAC OriginAccessControlOriginType: s3 SigningBehavior: always SigningProtocol: sigv4 # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # CloudFront Distribution (replaces direct S3 website access) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- CloudFrontDistribution: Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution Properties: DistributionConfig: Enabled: true DefaultRootObject: index.html Origins: - DomainName: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.RegionalDomainName Id: S3Origin OriginAccessControlId: !Ref CloudFrontOAC S3OriginConfig: OriginAccessIdentity: "" DefaultCacheBehavior: TargetOriginId: S3Origin ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https AllowedMethods: [GET, HEAD] CachedMethods: [GET, HEAD] ForwardedValues: QueryString: false Cookies: Forward: none CustomErrorResponses: - ErrorCode: 404 ResponseCode: 200 ResponsePagePath: /error.html ViewerCertificate: AcmCertificateArn: !Ref CertificateManagerCertificate SslSupportMethod: sni-only MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021 WebACLId: !GetAtt WebACL.Arn # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Bucket policy granting CloudFront access (not public) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- WebsiteBucketPolicy: Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy Properties: Bucket: !Ref WebsiteBucket PolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com Action: s3:GetObject Resource: !Sub '${WebsiteBucket.Arn}/*' Condition: StringEquals: AWS:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${CloudFrontDistribution}' # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 2. Cognito Identity Pool (unauthenticated only) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- IdentityPool: Type: AWS::Cognito::IdentityPool Properties: AllowUnauthenticatedIdentities: true IdentityPoolName: SlotMachinePool # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 3. IAM role for unauthenticated Cognito identities # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- CognitoUnauthRole: Type: AWS::IAM::Role Properties: AssumeRolePolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: cognito-identity.amazonaws.com Action: sts:AssumeRole Condition: StringEquals: 'cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:aud': !Ref IdentityPool ForAnyValue:StringLike: 'cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:amr': unauthenticated Policies: - PolicyName: InvokeSlotMachineLambda PolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Action: lambda:InvokeFunction Resource: !GetAtt SpinLambda.Arn IdentityPoolRoleAttachment: Type: AWS::Cognito::IdentityPoolRoleAttachment Properties: IdentityPoolId: !Ref IdentityPool Roles: unauthenticated: !GetAtt CognitoUnauthRole.Arn # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 4. IAM role for the spin Lambda function # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- SpinLambdaRole: Type: AWS::IAM::Role Properties: AssumeRolePolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: lambda.amazonaws.com Action: sts:AssumeRole ManagedPolicyArns: - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 5. Lambda function for slot spins # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- SpinLambda: Type: AWS::Lambda::Function Properties: Runtime: python3.12 Handler: index.lambda_handler Role: !GetAtt SpinLambdaRole.Arn Code: ZipFile: | import json, random symbols = ['cherry','lemon','bell','seven','bar'] wins = { ('seven','seven','seven'):100, ('bell','bell','bell'):20, ('bar','bar','bar'):15, ('cherry','cherry','cherry'):10, ('lemon','lemon','lemon'):5, ('cherry','cherry','*'):3, ('lemon','lemon','*'):2, ('seven','seven','*'):5 } def lambda_handler(event, context): spin = [random.choice(symbols) for _ in range(3)] win = 0 if tuple(spin) in wins: win = wins[tuple(spin)] else: key = (spin[0], spin[1], '*') if key in wins: win = wins[key] msg = f'You won {win} credits!' if win else 'Better luck next time' return {'statusCode':200,'headers':{'Content-Type':'application/json'},'body':json.dumps({'spin':spin,'win':win,'message':msg})} # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 6. Custom Lambda resource for website deployment # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- CustomResourceLambdaRole: Type: AWS::IAM::Role Properties: AssumeRolePolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: lambda.amazonaws.com Action: sts:AssumeRole Policies: - PolicyName: WebsiteDeployment PolicyDocument: Version: '2012-10-17' Statement: - Effect: Allow Action: - s3:PutObject - s3:PutObjectAcl Resource: !Sub '${WebsiteBucket.Arn}/*' - Effect: Allow Action: - kms:GenerateDataKey - kms:Decrypt Resource: !GetAtt WebsiteEncryptionKey.Arn - Effect: Allow Action: cloudfront:CreateInvalidation Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${CloudFrontDistribution}' - Effect: Allow Action: - logs:CreateLogGroup - logs:CreateLogStream - logs:PutLogEvents Resource: '*' CustomResourceLambda: Type: AWS::Lambda::Function Properties: Runtime: python3.12 Handler: index.lambda_handler Role: !GetAtt CustomResourceLambdaRole.Arn Timeout: 300 Code: ZipFile: | import json, os, tempfile, zipfile, urllib.request, boto3 s3 = boto3.client('s3') cloudfront = boto3.client('cloudfront') def send_response(event, context, status, data, reason=None): body = { 'Status': status, 'Reason': reason or 'See CloudWatch Logs', 'PhysicalResourceId': 'CustomWebsiteDeployment', 'StackId': event['StackId'], 'RequestId': event['RequestId'], 'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'], 'Data': data } json_body = json.dumps(body).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(event['ResponseURL'], data=json_body, method='PUT') req.add_header('Content-Type', '') req.add_header('Content-Length', len(json_body)) try: urllib.request.urlopen(req) except Exception as e: print(f'Failed to send response: {e}') def lambda_handler(event, context): try: request_type = event['RequestType'] props = event['ResourceProperties'] bucket = props['BucketName'] pool_id = props['IdentityPoolId'] region = props['Region'] lambda_arn = props['SpinLambdaArn'] distribution_id = props.get('DistributionId', '') zip_url = props.get('ZipUrl', '') if request_type == 'Delete': send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {}) return if zip_url: # Download and extract zip resp = urllib.request.urlopen(zip_url) with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix='.zip') as tmp: tmp.write(resp.read()) zip_path = tmp.name with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'r') as z: for name in z.namelist(): if name.startswith('__') or name.startswith('.'): continue data = z.read(name) # Inject configurations into HTML/JS files if name.endswith('.html') or name.endswith('.js'): content = data.decode('utf-8') content = content.replace('${IDENTITY_POOL_ID}', pool_id) content = content.replace('${REGION}', region) content = content.replace('${SPIN_LAMBDA_ARN}', lambda_arn) data = content.encode('utf-8') s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=name, Body=data) os.unlink(zip_path) else: # Generate default website index_html = f''' Slot Machine

🍒 Slot Machine 🎰

?
?
?

''' error_html = '

Error

' config_js = f'const IDENTITY_POOL_ID = "{pool_id}"; const REGION = "{region}"; const LAMBDA_ARN = "{lambda_arn}";' script_js = ''' AWS.config.region = REGION; AWS.config.credentials = new AWS.CognitoIdentityCredentials({ IdentityPoolId: IDENTITY_POOL_ID }); const lambda = new AWS.Lambda(); async function spin() { document.getElementById("result").innerText = "Spinning..."; try { const response = await lambda.invoke({ FunctionName: LAMBDA_ARN, InvocationType: "RequestResponse" }).promise(); const data = JSON.parse(response.Payload); const body = JSON.parse(data.body); document.getElementById("slot1").innerText = body.spin[0]; document.getElementById("slot2").innerText = body.spin[1]; document.getElementById("slot3").innerText = body.spin[2]; document.getElementById("result").innerText = body.message; } catch (err) { document.getElementById("result").innerText = "Error: " + err.message; } }; ''' s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key='index.html', Body=index_html.encode()) s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key='error.html', Body=error_html.encode()) s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key='config.js', Body=config_js.encode()) s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key='script.js', Body=script_js.encode()) # Invalidate CloudFront cache if distribution_id: cloudfront.create_invalidation( DistributionId=distribution_id, InvalidationBatch={ 'Paths': { 'Quantity': 1, 'Items': ['/*'] }, 'CallerReference': str(context.aws_request_id) } ) send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {}) except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {}, reason=str(e)) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 7. Custom Resource that triggers the deployment Lambda # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- WebsiteDeploymentCustomResource: Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource Properties: ServiceToken: !GetAtt CustomResourceLambda.Arn BucketName: !Ref WebsiteBucket IdentityPoolId: !Ref IdentityPool Region: !Ref 'AWS::Region' SpinLambdaArn: !GetAtt SpinLambda.Arn DistributionId: !Ref CloudFrontDistribution ZipUrl: !Ref ZipUrl # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # 8. Outputs # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- Outputs: WebsiteURL: Description: URL of the static website (served via CloudFront) Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName}' IdentityPoolId: Description: Cognito Identity Pool ID for frontend configuration Value: !Ref IdentityPool SpinLambdaArn: Description: ARN of the slot machine spin Lambda (for frontend configuration) Value: !GetAtt SpinLambda.Arn
