final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Jenkins Server Deployment across Multi-AZ with Auto Scaling"

Resources:
  JenkinsVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsVPC

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicSubnet2

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicNACL

  InboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  InboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  InboundSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  InboundJenkins:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080

  InboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 140
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  OutboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  OutboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  OutboundJenkins:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080

  OutboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  JenkinsIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsSSMRole

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsIAMRole

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins ALB
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsALBSecurityGroup

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins instances
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/1"
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: "128.0.0.0/1"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsSecurityGroup

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: "{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}"
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt JenkinsInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            amazon-linux-extras enable java-openjdk11
            yum install -y java-11-openjdk
            wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            yum install -y jenkins
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: JenkinsInstance

  JenkinsTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: JenkinsTG
      Port: 8080
      Protocol: HTTP
      TargetType: instance
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      HealthCheckPath: /login
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsTG

  JenkinsCert:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    Properties:
      DomainName: jenkins.example.com
      ValidationMethod: EMAIL

  JenkinsALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: JenkinsALB
      Scheme: internal
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: idle_timeout.timeout_seconds
          Value: '60'
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: true
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsALB

  JenkinsALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref JenkinsTargetGroup
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref JenkinsALB
      Port: 443
      Protocol: HTTPS
      Certificates:
        - CertificateArn: !Ref JenkinsCert

  JenkinsHTTPListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: HTTPS
            Port: "443"
            Host: "#{host}"
            Path: "/#{path}"
            Query: "#{query}"
            StatusCode: HTTP_301
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref JenkinsALB
      Port: 8080
      Protocol: HTTP

  JenkinsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: JenkinsASG
      MinSize: "1"
      MaxSize: "2"
      DesiredCapacity: "1"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref JenkinsTargetGroup
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref JenkinsVPC
  SubnetIds:
    Description: Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling Group Name
    Value: !Ref JenkinsAutoScalingGroup
  JenkinsURL:
    Description: "Jenkins is accessible via SSM Session Manager. Run 'aws ssm start-session --target <instance-id> --port-forwarding 8080' then open https://localhost:8080."
    Value: !Join ["", ["https://", !GetAtt JenkinsALB.DNSName, ":443"]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for encrypted EFS with cross-AZ EC2 integration,
  SSM management, and CloudWatch monitoring.'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets (two AZs) – no auto-assign public IP
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Subnet1'

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Subnet2'

  # Route Table and Associations
  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RT'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # EFS File System
  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS'

  # Security Group for EC2 instances – default egress (all outbound allowed)
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances (SSM and EFS outbound)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-SG'

  # Security Group for EFS mount targets – allows NFS inbound from EC2 SG
  EFSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-SG'

  # EFS Mount Targets in each public subnet
  MountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  MountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  # IAM Role and Instance Profile for EC2
  EC2IAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Path: /
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-Role'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMRole

  # Launch Template with IMDSv2 enforcement
  EC2LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LaunchTemplate'

  # EC2 Instances – one in each subnet
  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: MountTarget1
    Properties:
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EC2LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EC2LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance1'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub:
            - |
              #!/bin/bash
              yum install -y nfs-utils
              mkdir -p /home
              mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport ${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/ /home
              echo "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/ /home nfs4 defaults,noresvport 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
            - EFSFileSystem: !Ref EFSFileSystem

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: MountTarget2
    Properties:
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EC2LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EC2LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance2'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub:
            - |
              #!/bin/bash
              yum install -y nfs-utils
              mkdir -p /home
              mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport ${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/ /home
              echo "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/ /home nfs4 defaults,noresvport 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
            - EFSFileSystem: !Ref EFSFileSystem

  # CloudWatch Alarms for EFS
  EFSBurstCreditBalanceAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BurstCreditBalance-Low'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when EFS burst credit balance drops below 1 GiB'
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: BurstCreditBalance
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1073741824
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: missing

  EFSPercentIOLimitAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PercentIOLimit-High'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when EFS PercentIOLimit exceeds 90%'
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 90
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: missing

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  Subnet1Id:
    Description: ID of the first public subnet
    Value: !Ref Subnet1
  Subnet2Id:
    Description: ID of the second public subnet
    Value: !Ref Subnet2
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: ID of the encrypted EFS file system
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
  EC2Instance1Id:
    Description: ID of EC2 instance in Subnet1
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance1
  EC2Instance2Id:
    Description: ID of EC2 instance in Subnet2
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance2

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Minimal Redis caching solution with SSM-enabled EC2 access'

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  # Public Subnet for EC2 (no automatic public IP)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  # Private Subnet for ElastiCache
  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet'

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table (no default route)
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # ElastiCache Subnet Group
  ElastiCacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for Redis cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet

  # Security Group for EC2 (no inbound SSH, SSM via VPC endpoints)
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance (SSM access only)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'

  # Security Group for ElastiCache (no ingress here to avoid circular dependency)
  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache Redis
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-sg'

  # Separate ingress rule from EC2 to ElastiCache
  ElastiCacheIngressFromEC2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !GetAtt ElastiCacheSecurityGroup.GroupId
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 6379
      ToPort: 6379
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  # Separate egress rule from EC2 to ElastiCache
  EC2EgressToElastiCache:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 6379
      ToPort: 6379
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup

  # Security Group for VPC Endpoints (SSM)
  VPCEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for VPC Endpoints (SSM access)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-endpoint-sg'

  # VPC Endpoint for Systems Manager
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # VPC Endpoint for SSM Messages
  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # VPC Endpoint for EC2 Messages
  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # IAM Role for SSM
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-role'

  # Instance Profile
  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  # Launch Template for IMDSv2 enforcement
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'

  # EC2 Instance
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance'

  # ElastiCache Redis Cluster
  RedisCluster:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::CacheCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: redis
      CacheNodeType: cache.t3.micro
      NumCacheNodes: 1
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref ElastiCacheSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt ElastiCacheSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-redis'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

Outputs:
  RedisEndpointAddress:
    Description: Redis primary endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt RedisCluster.RedisEndpoint.Address

  RedisEndpointPort:
    Description: Redis primary endpoint port
    Value: !GetAtt RedisCluster.RedisEndpoint.Port

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Bedrock Agent with Lambda for stock price lookup

Resources:
  StockPriceLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  StockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs22.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt StockPriceLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({ price: 100 })
            };
          };

  BedrockAgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Secure, scalable Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with RDS Proxy integration"
Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraVPC"

  # Private Subnets in two AZs
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - "0"
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraPrivateSubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - "1"
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraPrivateSubnet2"

  # Private Route Table (no Internet Gateway)
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraPrivateRouteTable"

  # Associate subnets with private route table
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # DB Subnet Group
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for Aurora cluster"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  # Security Groups
  AuthorizedResourcesSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for authorized resources (e.g., Lambda)"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []

  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for Aurora cluster"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref RDSProxySecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AuthorizedResourcesSecurityGroup

  RDSProxySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for RDS Proxy"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AuthorizedResourcesSecurityGroup

  # Secrets Manager Secret for Master Password
  AuroraMasterSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: "AuroraMasterPassword"
      Description: "Master password for Aurora MySQL cluster"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"dbadmin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludePunctuation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraMasterSecret"
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  # IAM Role for Enhanced Monitoring
  EnhancedMonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "RDSEnhancedMonitoringRole"

  # IAM Role for RDS Proxy (Secret Retrieval)
  RDSProxyRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "rds.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "RDSProxySecretAccess"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: "secretsmanager:GetSecretValue"
                Resource: !Ref AuroraMasterSecret
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "RDSProxyRole"

  # KMS Key for Aurora Cluster Encryption
  AuroraKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "EnableRootAccess"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "AllowRDSUsage"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "rds.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:Encrypt"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey"
              - "kms:DescribeKey"
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraKmsKey"

  AuroraKmsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: "alias/aurora-cluster-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref AuroraKmsKey

  # Aurora DB Cluster
  AuroraDBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: "8.0.mysql_aurora.3.04.1"
      MasterUsername:
        Fn::Sub: "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${AuroraMasterSecret}::username}}"
      MasterUserPassword:
        Fn::Sub: "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${AuroraMasterSecret}::password}}"
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref AuroraKmsKey
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 35
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
        - slow_query
        - general
        - audit
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraMySQLCluster"
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  # Writer DB Instance
  AuroraDBInstanceWriter:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: "aurora-writer-1"
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt EnhancedMonitoringRole.Arn
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PerformanceInsightsRetentionPeriod: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraWriterInstance"

  # Reader DB Instance
  AuroraDBInstanceReader:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: "aurora-reader-1"
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt EnhancedMonitoringRole.Arn
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PerformanceInsightsRetentionPeriod: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraReaderInstance"

  # RDS Proxy
  RDSProxy:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxy
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: "AuroraProxy"
      EngineFamily: MYSQL
      RequireTLS: true
      RoleArn: !GetAtt RDSProxyRole.Arn
      Auth:
        - AuthScheme: SECRETS
          SecretArn: !Ref AuroraMasterSecret
          IAMAuth: DISABLED
      VpcSubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RDSProxySecurityGroup
      IdleClientTimeout: 1800
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "AuroraProxy"

  # RDS Proxy Target Group
  RDSProxyTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxyTargetGroup
    Properties:
      TargetGroupName: "default"
      DBProxyName: !Ref RDSProxy
      DBClusterIdentifiers:
        - !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      ConnectionPoolConfigurationInfo:
        MaxConnectionsPercent: 100
        MaxIdleConnectionsPercent: 50
        ConnectionBorrowTimeout: 120
        InitQuery: "SELECT 1"

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref VPC

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: "Private subnet IDs"
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]

  DBClusterEndpoint:
    Description: "Aurora cluster endpoint (writer)"
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.Endpoint.Address

  DBClusterReaderEndpoint:
    Description: "Aurora cluster reader endpoint"
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address

  RDSProxyEndpoint:
    Description: "RDS Proxy endpoint"
    Value: !GetAtt RDSProxy.Endpoint

  AuroraSecurityGroupId:
    Description: "Aurora cluster security group ID"
    Value: !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup

  RDSProxySecurityGroupId:
    Description: "RDS Proxy security group ID"
    Value: !Ref RDSProxySecurityGroup

  AuthorizedResourcesSecurityGroupId:
    Description: "Security group for authorized resources (e.g., Lambda)"
    Value: !Ref AuthorizedResourcesSecurityGroup

  MasterSecretArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Secrets Manager secret for master credentials"
    Value: !Ref AuroraMasterSecret

  KmsKeyId:
    Description: "KMS Key ID used for Aurora cluster encryption"
    Value: !Ref AuroraKmsKey
